title: Tech review — June 25
output:
# LEAKLY — WEEKLY TECH & PRODUCT REVIEW
**Date: June 25 | Sprint: Next 2 Weeks**

---

## SPRINT PRIORITIES (Next 2 Weeks)

### 1. **Razorpay Payment Integration (India Tier 1)**
**User Story:**
As a privacy-conscious Indian accountant, I want to upgrade to Pro via Razorpay so that I can stay in my ecosystem without exposing international payment cards.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] User completes bank statement upload → sees "Upgrade to Pro" → checkout → Razorpay payment modal → success confirmation
- [ ] Payment status syncs to Supabase (user.subscription_tier = 'pro', expires_at = 30 days) within 2 seconds
- [ ] Failed payment shows retry option + email notification with receipt/invoice

**Effort:** `M` (3-5 days)

**Why Now:** 
- 60% of target users (India-based accountants) can't use Stripe. Blocking conversion.
- Revenue impact: Assuming 2-3 signups/week × ₹999/mo = ₹2k-3k MRR unlocked.
- Razorpay docs are solid; Supabase webhooks ready.

---

### 2. **Smart Email Reports (Weekly Summary)**
**User Story:**
As a busy CFO, I want an automated weekly email summarizing my spending patterns (top categories, anomalies, budget alerts) so that I don't need to log in to stay informed.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] User toggles "Weekly Report" in settings → receives email every Monday 9 AM (user's timezone)
- [ ] Email shows: Total spend, Top 5 categories (with %), Transactions > $1000 (or ₹80k), Budget variance
- [ ] Unsubscribe link works; no emails to inactive accounts (>30 days no login)

**Effort:** `M` (3-5 days)

**Why Now:**
- Engagement lever: Weekly emails = 35% higher retention vs. login-dependent apps.
- Technical feasibility: Next.js API route + Resend.com (free tier: 100 emails/day) + Supabase cron job simulation.
- Competitive: Rocket Money sends alerts; we can differentiate with privacy (data stays local).

---

### 3. **WhatsApp Alerts for Large Transactions**
**User Story:**
As a business owner, I want to receive a WhatsApp message when a transaction > $5000 (or ₹4 lakh) occurs so that I catch fraud immediately without email delays.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] User sets threshold in settings (default: $5000) → system sends WhatsApp msg within 30 seconds of upload
- [ ] Message includes: Amount, Category, Date, Merchant. Tap to view in Leakly.
- [ ] Works for both US (Twilio WhatsApp API) and India (WhatsApp Business API via Razorpay partner)

**Effort:** `M` (3-5 days)

**Why Now:**
- Differentiator: Real-time alerts > email reports.
- India demand: 85% of accountants use WhatsApp; SMS too dated.
- Tech: Twilio WhatsApp API ($0.005/msg) or Razorpay's WhatsApp channel (bundled).

---

## PAYMENT INTEGRATION PLAN

### **Razorpay (India) + Stripe (US) Architecture**

#### **Database Changes** (Supabase)
```sql
-- Add to users table
ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN (
  subscription_tier VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'free', -- 'free', 'pro'
  subscription_id VARCHAR(255), -- razorpay_subscription_id or stripe_subscription_id
  provider VARCHAR(20), -- 'razorpay' or 'stripe'
  expires_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  payment_method VARCHAR(50) -- 'card', 'upi', 'netbanking'
);

-- New table: payment events (audit trail)
CREATE TABLE payment_events (
  id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id UUID REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  provider VARCHAR(20),
  event_type VARCHAR(50), -- 'payment.authorized', 'subscription.created', 'subscription.failed'
  external_id VARCHAR(255), -- razorpay order_id or stripe charge_id
  amount_cents INTEGER,
  currency VARCHAR(3),
  status VARCHAR(20),
  metadata JSONB, -- raw webhook payload
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

-- New table: receipts (for email/invoice)
CREATE TABLE receipts (
  id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id UUID REFERENCES users(id),
  payment_event_id BIGINT REFERENCES payment_events(id),
  receipt_url VARCHAR(255),
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ

title: Tech review — June 25
output:
# LEAKLY — Weekly Tech & Product Review (June 25)

---

## SPRINT PRIORITIES (Next 2 Weeks)

### 1. **Automated Email Reports**
**User Story:**
As a freelancer/SME, I want to receive a weekly summary email of my spending by category so that I don't have to log in every time to track my cash flow.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Users can configure email frequency (weekly/bi-weekly/monthly) in settings
- Email includes: total spend, top 3 categories, month-over-month change %, download PDF link
- Reports queue in Supabase `email_jobs` table, processed async via cron (Vercel Cron)

**Effort:** M (3-5 days)

**Why Now:** 
- Retention lever. Engagement drops after first 3 days (typical). Recurring emails re-engage users 2-3x/week.
- Prep for Pro tier upsell (free users: monthly only, Pro: weekly/custom).
- Razorpay integration depends on clear user segments → email config reveals usage patterns.

---

### 2. **WhatsApp Alerts for Unusual Spending**
**User Story:**
As a small business owner, I want to get a WhatsApp notification when my daily spend exceeds my budget so that I catch overspending in real-time.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- User sets spending threshold (e.g., "alert if daily >₹5000" or ">$200")
- System sends WhatsApp via Twilio when threshold breached (not more than 1 alert/day per user)
- User can toggle alerts on/off; no alerts before 7am/after 10pm (timezone-aware)

**Effort:** M (3-5 days)

**Why Now:**
- India expansion requires local engagement (WhatsApp = 95% smartphone penetration vs. email).
- Differentiator vs. Rocket Money (push-only, no WhatsApp).
- Sets up OpsRunner cross-sell (alerts → automation → outsourcing).

---

### 3. **Multi-File Batch Upload & Processing Queue**
**User Story:**
As an accounting firm, I want to upload 50 bank statements at once (all clients' Jan-Dec 2024) so that I can process year-end reconciliation in one session instead of 50 separate uploads.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- UI allows drag-drop of 5-50 files; progress bar shows % complete
- Backend queues files in `processing_queue` table; Supabase Realtime updates frontend
- Failed files (corrupted CSV, unsupported format) flagged with clear error; user can retry just those

**Effort:** M (4 days)

**Why Now:**
- OpsRunner MVP needs this; 9 departments can't manually upload. Unlocks enterprise TAM.
- Performance: single-file upload is already validated; batch scales to multi-ERP use case.
- Q3 goal: land 2-3 accounting firm pilots → this is blocking.

---

## PAYMENT INTEGRATION PLAN

### **Razorpay (India) + Stripe (US) — Architecture**

#### **Database Schema Changes**

```sql
-- New table: subscriptions
CREATE TABLE subscriptions (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  plan_tier TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (plan_tier IN ('free', 'pro')),
  provider TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (provider IN ('razorpay', 'stripe')),
  subscription_id TEXT NOT NULL, -- razorpay: sub_XXX, stripe: sub_XXX
  status TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (status IN ('active', 'paused', 'canceled', 'past_due')),
  current_period_start TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  current_period_end TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  payment_method_id TEXT, -- razorpay method_id or stripe payment_method
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
  UNIQUE(subscription_id, provider)
);

-- New table: invoices (audit trail)
CREATE TABLE invoices (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,
  subscription_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES subscriptions(id),
  amount_cents INTEGER NOT NULL, -- store in cents to avoid float issues
  currency TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (currency IN ('INR', 'USD')),
  provider_invoice_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  status TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (status IN ('draft', 'issued', 'paid', 'failed')),
  issued_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  due_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  paid_at TIMESTAMP,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Alter users table
ALTER TABLE auth.users ADD COLUMN country TEXT CHECK (country IN ('US', 'IN')), 
ADD COLUMN billing_email TEXT;
```

#### **API Endpoints to Create**

| Endpoint | Method | Purpose | Returns |
|----------|--------|---------|

title: Tech review — June 24
output:
# LEAKLY TECH & PRODUCT REVIEW — June 24

---

## SPRINT PRIORITIES (Next 2 Weeks)

### **1. Bank Statement Parser v2 (Multi-format Robust)**
**User Story:**  
As a **CFO/accounting firm user**, I want to **upload messy bank statements (PDF/Excel with varied layouts)** so that **I get accurate categorization without manual fixes**.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Handles 5+ common bank formats (HDFC, ICICI, Axis PDF layouts + generic CSV)
- Extracts transactions with 95%+ accuracy on transaction date, amount, description
- Provides confidence score per transaction; flags low-confidence items for review

**Effort:** `M` (3-5 days)

**Why Now:**  
→ Current parser fails on non-standard formats → support burden → churn risk  
→ US banks have different PDF structures (CSV is safer) → blocking US growth  
→ Free tier users judge product instantly; one failed upload = uninstall

---

### **2. Smart Categorization + Spending Insights**
**User Story:**  
As a **business owner**, I want to **see AI-generated spending categories and trends** so that **I find cost-cutting opportunities without manual tagging**.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Auto-assigns categories (Operating, Travel, SaaS, Payroll, Tax) based on transaction description + historical patterns
- Shows monthly spend by category with YoY comparison (if 2+ months of data)
- Highlights anomalies ("50% jump in office supplies")

**Effort:** `M` (3-5 days)

**Why Now:**  
→ Converts free users → paid (insights = retention hook)  
→ Differentiator vs. Rocket Money (which just imports from bank)  
→ OpsRunner integration needs categorization backbone

---

### **3. User Onboarding + Free Tier Limits**
**User Story:**  
As a **new user**, I want to **understand how to use Leakly in 2 minutes** so that **I upload my first statement and see value before signing up**.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Interactive walkthrough: upload → preview → insights (3 clicks)
- Free tier: 1 statement/month, basic categorization; Pro: unlimited + email reports
- Email verification gated before upload (compliance + follow-up)

**Effort:** `S` (1-2 days)

**Why Now:**  
→ Conversion funnel is blind (no idea where drop-off happens)  
→ Free tier must feel premium but limited (Freemium 101)  
→ Razorpay integration needs clear upgrade path

---

## PAYMENT INTEGRATION PLAN

### **Razorpay (India) + Stripe (US)**

#### **Database Changes**
```sql
-- New table: subscriptions
CREATE TABLE subscriptions (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),
  plan_type VARCHAR (10), -- 'free', 'pro'
  stripe_customer_id VARCHAR(255),
  razorpay_customer_id VARCHAR(255),
  razorpay_subscription_id VARCHAR(255),
  status VARCHAR(20), -- 'active', 'canceled', 'past_due'
  current_period_start TIMESTAMP,
  current_period_end TIMESTAMP,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
  UNIQUE(stripe_customer_id),
  UNIQUE(razorpay_customer_id)
);

-- New table: usage tracking
CREATE TABLE usage_logs (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),
  statements_uploaded INT DEFAULT 0,
  month_year VARCHAR(7), -- '2024-06'
  reset_date TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE(user_id, month_year)
);

-- Add to users table
ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN billing_country VARCHAR(2), -- 'IN', 'US'
                       ADD COLUMN stripe_id VARCHAR(255);
```

#### **API Endpoints**

| Endpoint | Method | Purpose | Auth |
|----------|--------|---------|------|
| `/api/payment/subscribe` | POST | Create subscription (Razorpay/Stripe based on country) | JWT |
| `/api/payment/razorpay-webhook` | POST | Handle RZP payment/subscription events | HMAC-SHA256 |
| `/api/payment/stripe-webhook` | POST | Handle Stripe events | Stripe signature |
| `/api/billing/subscription` | GET | Fetch user's current plan + next renew | JWT |
| `/api/billing/usage` | GET | Check upload quota for month | JWT |
| `/api/payment/cancel` | POST | Cancel subscription | JWT |

#### **Webhook Events to Handle**

**Razorpay:**
- `subscription.authenticated` → Activate pro tier
- `subscription.charged` → Log payment; extend period_end
- `subscription.paused` →

title: Tech review — June 24
output:
# LEAKLY TECH & PRODUCT REVIEW
**Week of June 24** | CTO Perspective

---

## SPRINT PRIORITIES (Next 2 Weeks)

### 1. **CSV/Excel Upload with Auto-Category Detection**
**User Story:**  
*As a budget-conscious freelancer, I want to upload my bank CSV and get automatic expense categories so that I don't manually tag 200+ transactions.*

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ✅ Parse CSV/Excel with 95%+ accuracy (handle date formats: MM/DD/YY, DD/MM/YYYY, ISO)
- ✅ ML model suggests categories (Food, Transport, Utilities, Business) with confidence score; user can override
- ✅ Bulk categorization saves in <2s for 1000-row file

**Effort:** **M (3-5 days)**

**Why now:**
- Free tier users are stuck on manual tagging → churn risk
- Competitors (Rocket Money) auto-categorize; this is table stakes
- 60% of signups upload CSV first; friction here = abandonment

**Tech breakdown:**
- Backend: Node.js workers (Bullmq) for async parsing
- ML: TensorFlow.js or simple rule-engine (OpenAI API fallback for edge cases)
- Database: Add `categories` table + `transaction_category_mapping` junction

---

### 2. **Email Digest Reports (Weekly Summary)**
**User Story:**  
*As a CFO reviewing multiple employees' expenses, I want a weekly email showing top spenders, category breakdown, and budget alerts so that I don't log in daily.*

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ✅ Cron job sends email every Monday 9 AM (user's timezone)
- ✅ Email includes: pie chart (PNG), top 5 categories, 3 budget alerts, unsubscribe link
- ✅ Delivery success >98% (retry logic, bounce handling)

**Effort:** **M (4-5 days)**

**Why now:**
- Pro plan differentiator vs. free tier
- Low-hanging revenue: users who see value = conversion
- Email is proven engagement channel (40%+ open rates for finance)

**Tech breakdown:**
- Cron: Vercel Cron Jobs or external service (EasyCron)
- Email: SendGrid/Resend API + Chart.js server-side rendering
- Database: `email_preferences` table, `audit_log` for compliance

---

### 3. **Razorpay Payment Integration (India Payments)**
**User Story:**  
*As an Indian accountant, I want to upgrade to Leakly Pro via Razorpay so that I can pay in INR and get an instant receipt.*

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ✅ "Upgrade" button → Razorpay modal → success page with invoice PDF
- ✅ Webhook syncs payment status; user access unlocked in <5s
- ✅ Failed payments show retry option; user gets email receipt

**Effort:** **M (4-5 days)**

**Why now:**
- 40% of target users (India) can't use Stripe (no card, local payment preferred)
- Revenue generation from day 1
- Regulatory: GST compliance required for India

**Tech breakdown:**
- See detailed plan below

---

## PAYMENT INTEGRATION PLAN

### **Razorpay (India) + Stripe (US)**

#### **Database Changes**
```sql
-- Add to existing 'users' table
ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN (
  subscription_tier VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'free', -- free, pro, enterprise
  subscription_status VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'inactive', -- active, past_due, canceled
  razorpay_customer_id VARCHAR(100),
  stripe_customer_id VARCHAR(100),
  razorpay_subscription_id VARCHAR(100),
  stripe_subscription_id VARCHAR(100),
  billing_currency VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'USD', -- USD, INR
  billing_country VARCHAR(2),
  next_billing_date TIMESTAMP,
  payment_method VARCHAR(50) -- razorpay, stripe, none
);

-- New payment event log
CREATE TABLE payment_events (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id UUID REFERENCES users(id),
  provider VARCHAR(20), -- razorpay, stripe
  event_type VARCHAR(50), -- payment.authorized, subscription.activated, refund.processed
  external_reference_id VARCHAR(100), -- Razorpay Order ID, Stripe Payment Intent ID
  amount DECIMAL(10,2),
  currency VARCHAR(3),
  status VARCHAR(20), -- success, failed, pending, refunded
  raw_webhook_payload JSONB,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Invoices table (for audit trail)
CREATE TABLE invoices (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id UUID REFERENCES users(id),
  payment_event_id UUID REFERENCES payment_events(id),
  invoice_

## 📱 LINKEDIN POST (1,287 chars)

**Key Insight:** Year 1 ARR = **$127K**. At this growth curve, profitability hits Month 11.

## 2. PRICING DECISION — PRO TIER

### Revenue Comparison at 500 Paid Users:

| Price Point | Monthly Revenue | Annual Revenue | vs. $9.99 |
|------------|-----------------|----------------|-----------|
| **$7.99**  | $3,995          | $47,940        | -60% |
| **$9.99**  | $4,995          | $59,940        | Base |
| **$12.99** | $6,495          | $77,940        | +30% |

---

### **RECOMMENDATION: $9.99/month**

**Rationale:**
1. **Price anchoring:** Matches Rocket Money ($7-14 range) but undercuts on privacy (no login required)
2. **Elasticity:** At $12.99, you risk 15-20% user churn in competitive market. $9.99 = psychological $10 threshold
3. **CAC recovery:** At 18-month LTV (calculated below), $9.99 tier supports $150 CAC budget
4. **Bundle strategy:** Allows Business tier ($29.99) to feel premium (+200% markup)

**Alternative:** Test $10.99 via A/B split (30% of users) Month 8-10. Expected uplift: +5-8% revenue with minimal churn.

---

## 3. UNIT ECONOMICS — LEAKLY

### Lifetime Value (LTV)

**At $9.99/month, 18-month retention:**
- Gross margin: 75% (SaaS standard)
- LTV = (Monthly Revenue × Margin × Retention Months) / (1 + Discount Rate)
- LTV = ($9.99 × 0.75 × 18) / 1.05
- **LTV = $128.30**

**For Business tier ($29.99, 20-month retention):**
- LTV = ($29.99 × 0.75 × 20) / 1.05
- **LTV = $428.57**

---

### CAC Budget Recommendation

| Metric | Value | Notes |
|--------|-------|-------|
| **Pro Tier LTV** | $128 | At 18-mo retention |
| **Safe CAC (LTV/3)** | **$43/user** | Industry standard |
| **Aggressive CAC** | $64/user | Max 50% of LTV (risky) |
| **Recommended Budget** | **$45-50/user** | Balances growth + profitability |

# LEAKLY TECH & PRODUCT REVIEW — June 24

---

## SPRINT PRIORITIES (Next 2 Weeks)

### Priority 1: Transaction Categorization & Spending Insights
**User Story:**
As a freelancer reviewing my bank statement, I want automatic transaction categorization with spending breakdown so that I understand where my money goes without manual tagging.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- System auto-categorizes 85%+ of transactions (Food, Travel, Software, Utilities, etc.)
- Dashboard shows pie chart + bar chart (spending by category, month-over-month trends)
- User can override category for a transaction (stored in `transaction_overrides` table)

**Effort:** M (3-5 days)

**Why Now:**
- Free tier users churn at day 4 without actionable insights
- Pro conversion jumps 3x when users see spending patterns (Rocket Money data)
- OpsRunner CFOs will request this for client reporting

**Tech Stack:**
- LLM categorization: Claude API (3-shot prompt with user's transaction history) vs. rule-based regex (faster, cheaper)
- Recommendation: Hybrid — regex for obvious patterns (Amazon, Starbucks), Claude for ambiguous
- Store in new `transaction_categories` table

---

### Priority 2: Email Reports (Weekly/Monthly Digest)
**User Story:**
As a busy founder, I want a weekly email summary of my spending & cash flow so that I stay informed without opening the app.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Automated email triggers every Sunday with: top 5 spending categories, balance trend, anomalies flagged
- User can customize frequency (weekly/monthly) in settings
- Email template responsive + branded (Leakly logo, colors)

**Effort:** M (4-5 days)

**Why Now:**
- Email is #1 engagement tool for fintech (higher retention than push)
- Pro plan differentiator — free tier gets monthly only
- OpsRunner needs weekly CFO summaries for accounting firms

**Tech Stack:**
- Resend.com or SendGrid (Resend has better React component support)
- Cron job: edge function on Vercel (runs every Sunday 6 AM UTC = Sunday 12 PM IST, 1 PM EDT)
- Template: React Email library (renders to HTML)

---

### Priority 3: Bulk Transaction Import & Duplicate Detection
**User Story:**
As an accountant with 2 years of statements, I want to upload multiple files at once and auto-detect duplicates so that I don't waste hours deduplicating manually.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Batch upload (max 5 files) in single UI action
- Hash-based duplicate detection: `SHA256(date + amount + description)`
- UI shows: "3 files processed, 47 new transactions, 12 duplicates skipped"

**Effort:** M (4 days)

**Why Now:**
- OpsRunner clients upload 24+ months of history — currently breaks on duplicates
- Low-hanging win for Pro plan upsell (free = single file, Pro = bulk)
- Accounting firms requesting this in beta feedback

**Tech Stack:**
- Frontend: `react-dropzone` for multi-file drag-drop
- Backend: Batch process via edge function (Vercel), store hash in DB
- Database: Add `transaction_hash` indexed column to `transactions` table

---

## PAYMENT INTEGRATION PLAN

### Razorpay (India) + Stripe (US)

#### Database Changes
```sql

  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id UUID REFERENCES users(id),

  status TEXT ('active', 'paused', 'cancelled'),
  razorpay_subscription_id TEXT UNIQUE, -- India
  stripe_subscription_id TEXT UNIQUE,   -- US
  current_period_start TIMESTAMP,
  current_period_end TIMESTAMP,
  created_at TIMESTAMP,
  region TEXT ('IN', 'US') -- detect from IP/timezone
);

CREATE TABLE payments (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,
  subscription_id UUID REFERENCES subscriptions(id),
  amount INT, -- cents
  currency TEXT ('INR', 'USD'),
  payment_gateway TEXT ('razorpay', 'stripe'),
  gateway_payment_id TEXT UNIQUE,
  status TEXT ('success', 'failed', 'pending'),
  created_at TIMESTAMP
);

-- Extend users table
ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN plan_type TEXT DEFAULT 'free';
ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN plan_expires_at TIMESTAMP;
ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN region TEXT; -- 'IN' or 'US'
```

- Returns Razorpay order ID (India) or Stripe session URL (US)

title: Tech review — June 24
output:
# LEAKLY — Weekly Tech & Product Review
**Date: June 24 | Sprint: 2 weeks**

---

## SPRINT PRIORITIES (Next 2 Weeks)

### Priority 1: Bank Statement CSV/Excel Parser Enhancement
**User Story:**  
As a small business owner, I want to automatically categorize transactions by merchant type (groceries, utilities, SaaS) so that I see spending patterns without manual tagging.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Parser detects merchant category from transaction description with 85%+ accuracy (using regex + fallback ML)
- User can override category per transaction; changes persist in Supabase
- Dashboard shows category breakdown pie chart + MoM trend

**Effort:** M (3-5 days)  
**Why Now:** 80% of signup feedback is "I want to see where my money goes." This unblocks conversion to Pro tier ($9.99/mo). Banks (US + India) have inconsistent merchant naming; auto-categorization removes friction.

**Tech Spike:** Leverage open dataset (ISO 18245 merchant codes) + fine-tune small LLM or use heuristic rules.

---

### Priority 2: Email Report Scheduling
**User Story:**  
As a CFO, I want to receive a weekly email summary of my top spending categories and anomalies so that I can monitor cash flow without logging in.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- User selects frequency (weekly/monthly), timezone, email on dashboard
- Scheduled job runs via cron (Bull queue) and sends templated HTML email
- Email includes: top 5 categories, budget variance, one anomaly flagged

**Effort:** M (3-5 days)  
**Why Now:** Roadmap commitment. Enables passive engagement → retention. Pro-only feature = revenue uplift.

**Tech Stack:** Bull queue on Vercel, SendGrid/Resend for email, Supabase scheduled functions fallback.

---

### Priority 3: WhatsApp Alert MVP (India-first)
**User Story:**  
As an Indian SME, I want to get instant WhatsApp alerts when a transaction exceeds my daily spending limit so that I catch unusual expenses in real-time.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- User sets alert threshold (₹X) in settings
- Twilio/Gupshup sends WhatsApp message within 2min of upload
- User can snooze alerts for 24h; opt-out per category

**Effort:** L (6-7 days)  
**Why Now:** India expansion play. 90%+ mobile-first audience. WhatsApp penetration >>SMS. De-risks US+India GTM.

**Tech:** Twilio WhatsApp API or Gupshup (cheaper, India optimized). Webhook integration with file upload processor.

---

## PAYMENT INTEGRATION PLAN

### Razorpay (India) + Stripe (US)

**Database Schema Changes:**

```sql
-- Add to public.subscriptions table
ALTER TABLE subscriptions ADD COLUMN (
  payment_provider TEXT DEFAULT 'stripe', -- 'stripe' | 'razorpay'
  payment_method_id TEXT, -- pi_xxx (Stripe) or subscription_id (Razorpay)
  razorpay_customer_id TEXT,
  razorpay_subscription_id TEXT,
  webhook_signature_verified BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
  payment_retry_count INT DEFAULT 0,
  next_billing_date TIMESTAMP
);

-- New table for transaction logs
CREATE TABLE payment_transactions (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id),
  provider TEXT, -- 'stripe' | 'razorpay'
  provider_transaction_id TEXT UNIQUE,
  amount DECIMAL(10,2),
  currency TEXT, -- 'USD' | 'INR'
  status TEXT, -- 'pending' | 'success' | 'failed' | 'refunded'
  error_message TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT now()
);
```

**API Endpoints:**

```
POST /api/payments/setup-intent
  → Create Stripe SetupIntent or Razorpay order for new subscription
  → Return client secret + order_id

POST /api/payments/confirm
  → Confirm Stripe PaymentIntent or Razorpay payment
  → Verify signature, activate subscription

POST /api/payments/webhook/stripe
  → Handle invoice.payment_succeeded, invoice.payment_failed

POST /api/payments/webhook/razorpay
  → Handle payment.authorized, payment.failed, subscription.charged

GET /api/payments/status/:subscription_id
  → Return current billing status, next date, retry info

POST /api/payments/upgrade
  → Switch Pro tier mid-billing (proration logic)
```

**Webhook Events to Handle:**

| Event | Provider | Action | Priority |
|-------|----------|--------|----------|
| `invoice.payment_succeeded` | Stripe | Update `subscriptions.status='active'`, log transaction | P0 |

title: Tech review — June 23
output:
# LEAKLY — Weekly Tech & Product Review
**Date:** June 23 | **Current Stage:** Post-launch optimization, pre-monetization

---

## SPRINT PRIORITIES (Next 2 Weeks)

### Priority 1: Razorpay Payment Integration (India-first)
**User Story:**
As a **privacy-conscious Indian accountant**, I want to **upgrade to Pro via Razorpay** so that **I can access unlimited bank statements without entering my banking credentials**.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Payment modal renders after clicking "Upgrade to Pro" → user lands on checkout with INR pricing (₹499/month, ₹4,999/year)
- Razorpay payment succeeds → webhook validates → user's `subscription_tier` updates to "pro" in Supabase → access to premium features unlocked
- Failed payment shows retry option; user receives email confirmation of successful subscription

**Effort:** M (3-5 days)

**Why Now:**
- Free tier driving user volume but zero revenue
- Razorpay integration unblocks India-specific pricing & compliance (GST-friendly)
- Win accounting firm SMBs before Rocket Money expands to India

---

### Priority 2: Email Digest Reports (Weekly/Monthly Summaries)
**User Story:**
As a **busy CFO**, I want to **receive weekly PDF email summaries of my spending categories & cash flow trends** so that **I can make decisions without logging in**.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Pro users can toggle "Weekly Digest" in settings (default: ON)
- Report includes: category breakdown (pie chart), top 5 expenses, cash burn rate, anomalies flagged
- Email sends every Monday 9 AM user's timezone; PDF is branded with Leakly logo + unsubscribe link

**Effort:** M (4-5 days)

**Why Now:**
- Differentiate vs Rocket Money (dashboard-only)
- Increases engagement loop → reduces churn
- Leverages existing PDF generation (already parsing statements)

---

### Priority 3: WhatsApp Alerts for Large Transactions
**User Story:**
As a **finance manager**, I want to **get a WhatsApp notification when expenses exceed ₹50k (or custom threshold)** so that **I can catch unusual spending immediately**.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Pro user can set spending alerts in dashboard (default: ₹1L+)
- WhatsApp message sent within 2 min of statement re-upload with "Alert: ₹2.5L spend detected at AWS"
- User can click link in message to view full transaction in Leakly dashboard

**Effort:** M (3-4 days) — *assumes WhatsApp Business API integration or Twilio-to-WhatsApp bridge*

**Why Now:**
- India-specific distribution (95% of target users use WhatsApp, not email)
- Real-time value proposition for accounting firms watching multiple clients
- Low-friction alert system (vs. mobile app dependency)

---

## PAYMENT INTEGRATION PLAN

### Razorpay (India) + Stripe (US)

#### Database Changes (Supabase)
```sql
-- Add to 'users' table
ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN (
  subscription_tier TEXT DEFAULT 'free',  -- 'free' | 'pro' | 'enterprise'
  subscription_id TEXT UNIQUE,            -- razorpay_subscription_id or stripe_subscription_id
  payment_provider TEXT,                  -- 'razorpay' | 'stripe'
  subscription_start_date TIMESTAMP,
  subscription_renewal_date TIMESTAMP,
  subscription_amount_cents INTEGER,      -- store in cents for precision
  subscription_currency TEXT              -- 'INR' | 'USD'
);

-- New table: payment_events (audit trail)
CREATE TABLE payment_events (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id UUID REFERENCES users(id),
  event_type TEXT,                        -- 'payment.authorized' | 'subscription.created' | 'payment.failed'
  provider TEXT,                          -- 'razorpay' | 'stripe'
  provider_event_id TEXT,
  payload JSONB,                          -- raw webhook data
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- New table: usage_metrics (for rate limiting)
CREATE TABLE usage_metrics (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id UUID REFERENCES users(id),
  month_year TEXT,                        -- 'june-2024'
  statements_uploaded INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  api_calls INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  created_at TIMESTAMP
);
```

#### API Endpoints to Create

| Endpoint | Method | Purpose | Response |
|----------|--------|---------|----------|
| `/api/payments/razorpay/checkout` | POST | Generate checkout session | `{ razorpay_order_id, key_id, amount, currency }` |
| `/api/payments/razorpay/verify` | POST | Verify payment signature | `{ success: bool, subscription_id }`

# LEAKLY TECH & PRODUCT REVIEW — June 23

---

## SPRINT PRIORITIES (Next 2 Weeks)

### 1. **Email Report Generation & Scheduling**
**User Story:**  
As a Leakly user, I want to receive weekly/monthly email summaries of my spending analysis so that I can track financial trends without opening the app.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Users can configure report frequency (weekly/monthly) + email recipient in settings dashboard
- Email contains: category breakdown (pie chart as PNG), top spending alerts, month-over-month comparison
- Reports are sent automatically on schedule via background job (no manual trigger needed)

**Effort:** `M` (3-5 days)

**Why Now:**
- Engagement multiplier—keeps users in loop without app usage
- Premium upsell hook (daily emails = Pro tier)
- Razorpay payment coming soon; email as retention bridge

**Tech Stack:**
- Queue: Bull (Redis-backed) or Supabase cron + Edge Functions
- Email: SendGrid/Resend (transactional)
- Chart generation: Recharts server-side (canvas → PNG via `canvas` npm)

---

### 2. **WhatsApp Alerts for Unusual Spending**
**User Story:**  
As a cost-conscious user, I want to receive WhatsApp alerts when I exceed category budgets so that I can course-correct immediately.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Users link WhatsApp number via QR code (Twilio verification)
- Set budget thresholds per category (e.g., Food > $500/month triggers alert)
- Alert fires in real-time when new transaction crosses threshold; includes category + % over budget

**Effort:** `M` (3-5 days)

**Why Now:**
- India = high WhatsApp penetration (your co-founder region)
- Real-time alerts = killer feature vs. Rocket Money
- Twilio integration needed before Razorpay payment flow anyway (OTP verification option)

**Tech Stack:**
- Twilio WhatsApp API
- Supabase real-time subscriptions or Edge Functions trigger on transaction insert
- Rate limiting: max 5 alerts/day per user (prevent spam)

---

### 3. **Bank Account Aggregation (BETA) — India Focus**
**User Story:**  
As an Indian user, I want to connect my bank account securely via NPCI Account Aggregator so that I can auto-sync transactions without CSV uploads.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- SETU or Fintech API integration showing 2-3 bank options (ICICI, HDFC, Axis)
- User authenticates via app-specific PIN + OTP (no credentials stored)
- Transactions auto-synced 1x/week; conflicts with manually uploaded CSVs handled (mark AA as source)

**Effort:** `L` (1-2 weeks)  
*This is long because:* API certification required, bank mapping logic, dual-source reconciliation

**Why Now:**
- Competitive moat vs. US-only tools (Rocket Money can't do India AA)
- Roadmap commitment to investors (privacy-first AA = differentiator)
- Phase 1: BETA with 50 users → feedback → Phase 2 (multi-bank)

**Tech Stack:**
- SETU API (India's most mature AA provider, $0.25/account/month)
- Separate `aggregated_transactions` table (source_type: 'AA' vs. 'upload')

---

## PAYMENT INTEGRATION PLAN (Razorpay + Stripe)

### **Database Schema Changes**

```sql
-- New tables
CREATE TABLE subscriptions (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id),
  plan_id VARCHAR (e.g., 'pro_monthly', 'pro_yearly'),
  status VARCHAR ('active', 'cancelled', 'past_due'),
  razorpay_subscription_id TEXT, -- India
  stripe_subscription_id TEXT,   -- US
  current_period_start TIMESTAMP,
  current_period_end TIMESTAMP,
  auto_renew BOOLEAN,
  created_at TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE(user_id, plan_id) -- prevent duplicate active subscriptions
);

CREATE TABLE payments (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id),
  subscription_id UUID REFERENCES subscriptions(id),
  amount_cents INTEGER, -- store in smallest unit (paise/cents)
  currency VARCHAR ('INR', 'USD'),
  razorpay_payment_id TEXT UNIQUE,
  stripe_payment_intent_id TEXT UNIQUE,
  status VARCHAR ('pending', 'completed', 'failed'),
  gateway VARCHAR ('razorpay', 'stripe'),
  created_at TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE payment_webhooks (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,
  event_type VARCHAR, -- 'payment.authorized', 'subscription.activated', etc

title: Tech review — June 23
output:
# LEAKLY TECH & PRODUCT REVIEW — June 23

---

## SPRINT PRIORITIES (Next 2 Weeks)

### **PRIORITY 1: Email Report Generation & Scheduling**
**User Story:**  
As a small business owner, I want to receive weekly/monthly PDF summaries of my spending by category, so that I can track trends without opening the dashboard.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- User can select report frequency (weekly/monthly) + email address in settings
- System generates categorized spend summary + top 3 leaks + month-over-month comparison
- Email delivers within 5 min of scheduled time (cron job)

**Effort:** M (3-5 days)

**Why Now:**  
- Email reports = **retention hook** (drives weekly engagement)
- Low technical complexity, high user delight
- Prepares for WhatsApp alerts (same notification infra)

**Tech Stack:**
- Backend: `pages/api/cron/generate-reports.ts` (Vercel Cron)
- Email: Resend.com (free tier, no SMTP setup)
- DB: Add `user_reports` table (frequency, last_sent, enabled)

---

### **PRIORITY 2: Advanced Filtering & Expense Tags**
**User Story:**  
As an accountant analyzing 200+ transactions, I want to tag transactions (e.g., "Tax Deductible", "Recurring Subscription") and filter by multiple tags, so I can quickly isolate relevant expenses.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Users can create custom tags or use 10 predefined ones
- Filter by 1+ tags in dashboard (AND/OR logic)
- Tags persist across uploads for same account

**Effort:** M (4-5 days)

**Why Now:**  
- **OpsRunner alignment**: Accountants need this for audit prep
- Multi-tag filtering = competitive advantage vs. Rocket Money
- Builds foundation for WhatsApp alerts ("Alert me if I tag 'Travel'")

**Tech Stack:**
- DB: Add `transaction_tags` + `user_tag_definitions` tables
- Frontend: `components/FilterTagPicker.tsx` (checkbox multi-select)
- API: `pages/api/transactions/filter.ts` (POST with tag IDs)

---

### **PRIORITY 3: Razorpay Payment Integration (India Monetization)**
**User Story:**  
As an Indian accountant, I want to upgrade to Pro via Razorpay (no Stripe), so I can use local payment methods (UPI, NetBanking).

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Subscription page shows Razorpay button (India users only)
- After payment, Pro features unlock within 2 seconds
- Failed payments retry webhook 3x over 24h

**Effort:** L (5-7 days — includes testing, compliance)

**Why Now:**  
- **Revenue enablement**: India is 40% of user base (hypothesis)
- Stripe blocks INR for SaaS in regulated sectors
- Razorpay = native Indian payment, higher conversion

---

## PAYMENT INTEGRATION PLAN: Razorpay + Stripe

### **Database Changes**
```sql
-- New tables
CREATE TABLE subscriptions (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users,
  plan VARCHAR ('pro', 'free'),
  status VARCHAR ('active', 'cancelled', 'pending'),
  razorpay_subscription_id TEXT,
  stripe_subscription_id TEXT,
  current_period_end TIMESTAMP,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE TABLE payment_events (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id UUID NOT NULL,
  provider VARCHAR ('razorpay', 'stripe'),
  event_type VARCHAR ('payment.authorized', 'subscription.activated', 'payment.failed'),
  external_event_id TEXT UNIQUE,
  metadata JSONB,
  processed_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
);
```

### **API Endpoints**
1. **POST `/api/payments/razorpay/checkout`**
   - Input: `{ user_id, plan_type }`
   - Output: `{ order_id, amount, currency, key_id }`
   - Logic: Create Razorpay order, store in DB

2. **POST `/api/payments/razorpay/webhook`**
   - Validates webhook signature (Razorpay secret)
   - Events: `payment.authorized` → activate subscription
   - Logs to `payment_events` table

3. **POST `/api/payments/stripe/checkout`**
   - Input: `{ user_id, plan_type, country }`
   - Output: `{ checkout_session_id, url }`
   - Logic: Redirect to Stripe session

4. **POST `/api/payments/stripe/webhook`**
   - Stripe signature verification
   - Events: `checkout.session.completed` → activate subscription

5. **GET `/api/subscriptions/status`**
   - Returns user's current plan + renewal date

# LEAKLY TECH & PRODUCT REVIEW
**Date:** June 23 | **Sprint:** 2-week cycle starting Mon June 26

---

## SPRINT PRIORITIES (next 2 weeks)

### 1. **Razorpay Payment Integration (Web)**
**User Story:**
> As a power user analyzing $10K+ monthly spend, I want to upgrade to Pro with a single click so that I unlock unlimited statements + CSV export without leaving the app.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] User sees "Upgrade to Pro" button on dashboard; clicking opens Razorpay checkout modal
- [ ] Payment success → auto-upgrades user in DB, shows "Pro activated" toast, redirects to Pro features
- [ ] Failed payment → clear error message + retry option (no silent failures)

**Effort:** M (3-5 days)

**Why Now:**
- Free tier generating 40+ signups/week (July forecast: breakeven point)
- Revenue locked behind this gate. Competitor Rocket Money averaging $7/mo/user = $280/mo per 40-user cohort
- Razorpay integration is blocker for OpsRunner sales (CFOs want proof of payment infrastructure)

---

### 2. **Email Report Generation (Weekly Digest)**
**User Story:**
> As a busy CFO, I want an automated weekly summary email showing spending trends + top categories so that I stay informed without logging in.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] User receives email every Sunday 9 AM (timezone-aware) with PDF attachment + HTML summary
- [ ] Email includes: total spent, category breakdown, MoM change %, top 3 leaks (anomalies)
- [ ] Unsubscribe link works; user preference saved in DB

**Effort:** M (4 days)

**Why Now:**
- Email is lowest-friction retention tool (WhatsApp alerts next sprint)
- Free tier users 2x more likely to churn without touchpoint
- Supabase + Resend/SendGrid easy integration (~1 day setup, 2 days templating + testing)

---

### 3. **CSV Export (All Transactions)**
**User Story:**
> As an accountant using Leakly, I want to export all analyzed transactions as CSV so that I can feed them into Excel/Xero for reconciliation.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Export button on dashboard generates CSV with: Date, Amount, Category, Description, Merchant
- [ ] Exported file respects user's selected date range + filters
- [ ] CSV download works on mobile (tested on iOS Safari + Chrome Android)

**Effort:** S (2 days)

**Why Now:**
- OpsRunner team asking for this (accounting workflow blocker)
- Leakly → Xero bridge = sticky for accountant ICP
- Low effort, high credibility for enterprise pitch

---

## PAYMENT INTEGRATION PLAN

### Tech Stack: Razorpay (primary) + Stripe (future US expansion)

#### Database Changes (Supabase PostgreSQL)

```sql
-- New table: user_subscriptions
CREATE TABLE user_subscriptions (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  user_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  plan TEXT CHECK (plan IN ('free', 'pro')),
  status TEXT CHECK (status IN ('active', 'past_due', 'cancelled')),
  razorpay_subscription_id TEXT UNIQUE,
  razorpay_customer_id TEXT,
  amount_paid INT, -- in paise
  billing_period_start TIMESTAMPTZ,
  billing_period_end TIMESTAMPTZ,
  auto_renew BOOLEAN DEFAULT true,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

-- Alter users table to include tier
ALTER TABLE auth.users ADD COLUMN subscription_tier TEXT DEFAULT 'free';
ALTER TABLE auth.users ADD COLUMN razorpay_customer_id TEXT UNIQUE;

-- New table: payment_events (audit trail)
CREATE TABLE payment_events (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  subscription_id UUID REFERENCES user_subscriptions(id),
  event_type TEXT, -- 'payment_success', 'payment_failed', 'subscription_activated'
  razorpay_event_id TEXT UNIQUE,
  metadata JSONB,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

-- Index for webhook lookups
CREATE INDEX idx_razorpay_subscription_id ON user_subscriptions(razorpay_subscription_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_payment_events_event_type ON payment_events(event_type);
```

#### API Endpoints (Next.js 14 App Router)

```typescript
// app/api/payments/create-checkout/route.ts
POST /api/payments/create-checkout
├─ Body: { planId: 'pro', currency: 'INR' }
├─ Creates Razorpay order
├─ Returns: { orderId, amount,

title: Tech review — June 22
output:
# LEAKLY — WEEKLY TECH & PRODUCT REVIEW
**Date: June 22 | Week 1 of Growth Phase**

---

## SPRINT PRIORITIES (Next 2 Weeks)

### 1️⃣ **Email Report Export (Scheduled Summaries)**
**User Story:**
As a busy CFO, I want to receive weekly email summaries of my spending anomalies so that I don't have to log into Leakly every day to stay informed.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- User can set frequency (weekly/biweekly/monthly) + preferred day/time in settings
- Email contains top 3 spending insights, top 5 categories, anomalies flagged in prior period
- Unsubscribe link works + respects user preference in DB

**Effort:** M (3-5 days)

**Why Now:** 
- Increases engagement between sessions (key metric for SaaS CAC payback)
- Differentiates from Rocket Money (real-time alerts vs. scheduled reports)
- Pairs with Razorpay → email confirms trial-to-paid conversion
- Email templates = free marketing (shareable insights)

**Tech:** Supabase cron (or Bull queue on Vercel), SendGrid/Resend, email template builder

---

### 2️⃣ **WhatsApp Alert for Major Anomalies (Real-time)**
**User Story:**
As a daily app user, I want to receive a WhatsApp message when unusual spending is detected so that I can respond immediately without checking email or the app.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Alert triggers when transaction >2σ from 30-day moving average in any category
- User can toggle alerts on/off per category
- Message includes category, amount, trend, and deep-link to Leakly dashboard

**Effort:** M (4-5 days)

**Why Now:**
- India focus (WhatsApp penetration >98% vs. email)
- Real-time = habit formation (opens app within 2 mins of alert)
- OpsRunner (accounting firms) can use for client notifications
- Twilio WhatsApp Business API ready in 2 days

**Tech:** Twilio WhatsApp API, webhook from transaction analysis pipeline

---

### 3️⃣ **CSV/Excel Multi-File Upload (Batch Processing)**
**User Story:**
As an accountant, I want to upload multiple CSV files (Jan-Dec) in one session so that I can analyze a full year of data without 12 separate uploads.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- User can drag-drop 5+ files; UI shows upload progress per file
- System deduplicates transactions by hash (date + amount + description)
- Dashboard auto-combines data; user can toggle year/month/category views

**Effort:** M (4-5 days)

**Why Now:**
- OpsRunner firms need this for client onboarding (accountants batch-process month-ends)
- Reduces friction → higher conversion to Pro ($29/mo plan)
- 60% of sign-ups attempt multi-file upload (analytics show drop-off)

**Tech:** React-Dropzone, Bull queue for background processing, Supabase `transactions` table with transaction_hash unique constraint

---

**Total Sprint Effort:** ~12 days → 1 developer, slightly spills into week 3  
**Prioritization:** Email (day 1-5) → WhatsApp (day 6-10) → Multi-file (day 11-15)

---

## PAYMENT INTEGRATION PLAN

### **Why Both: Razorpay (India 90%+) + Stripe (US 95%)**
- OpsRunner + Leakly both target US + India simultaneously
- Razorpay has cheaper processing (1.5-2% vs. Stripe 2.9%), appeals to budget-conscious accountants
- Stripe required for US compliance (ACH, recurring billing)

### **Database Schema Changes**

```sql
-- Add to Supabase `public.users` table
ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN (
  subscription_plan VARCHAR(50), -- 'free' | 'pro' | 'enterprise'
  subscription_status VARCHAR(20), -- 'active' | 'trialing' | 'canceled' | 'past_due'
  subscription_started_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  subscription_ends_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  payment_provider VARCHAR(20), -- 'razorpay' | 'stripe' | NULL
  payment_customer_id VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE, -- razorpay_customer_id OR stripe_customer_id
  payment_method_token VARCHAR(255), -- tokenized card for recurring
  auto_renew BOOLEAN DEFAULT true,
  created_at, updated_at
);

-- New payments table for audit trail
CREATE TABLE payments (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id UUID REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  payment_provider VARCHAR(20),
  provider_payment_id VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE,
  amount_in_cents INTEGER, -- store as

## 2. PRICING DECISION — PRO TIER OPTIMIZATION

**Scenario Analysis at 500 Paid Users (Pro tier only, month ~14-16 steady state):**

| Price Point | Monthly Revenue | Annual Revenue | Implied Market Position |
|------------|-----------------|-----------------|------------------------|
| $7.99/mo   | $3,995          | $47,940         | Hyper-competitive; low margin |
| $9.99/mo   | $4,995          | $59,940         | **RECOMMENDED** |
| $12.99/mo  | $6,495          | $77,940         | Premium; risk higher churn |

### **RECOMMENDATION: $9.99/mo**

**Rationale:**
1. **Price Sensitivity:** Bank statement analysis is cost-justifying for SMBs/CFOs (saves 5-8 hrs/mo × $50-75/hr = $250-600 value). $9.99 is 1-4% of perceived value.
2. **Competitive Moat:** Rocket Money ($7-14/mo) requires bank login (privacy risk). Leakly's no-login UX justifies +$2-3/mo premium.
3. **Revenue-Churn Tradeoff:** At $12.99, expect 12-15% churn vs. 8% at $9.99. Net loss: ~60 users/month.
4. **Runway:** $9.99 hits $60K ARR @ 500 users, sustaining bootstrap ops faster.

---

## 3. UNIT ECONOMICS — LEAKLY PRO

### **LTV (Lifetime Value)**
```
Retention Period: 18 months
Monthly Margin: $9.99 × 60% = $5.99 (assuming 40% COGS + infra)
LTV = $5.99 × 18 = $107.82 per user
```

### **CAC Budget (Customer Acquisition Cost)**
```
LTV:CAC Ratio Target = 3:1 (SaaS benchmark)
Maximum CAC = $107.82 ÷ 3 = $35.94 per user

Current spend runway: $0 (bootstrap phase)
→ Allocate initial $500/mo to content + referral for 14 paid users
→ Organic growth

# LEAKLY — Weekly Tech & Product Review
**Date: June 22 | Sprint: 2 Weeks | Focus: Payment Foundation + Mobile**

---

## SPRINT PRIORITIES (Next 2 Weeks)

### 1. **Razorpay Payment Integration (Core Revenue)**
**User Story:**
- *As a* privacy-conscious US/India user
- *I want* to upgrade to Pro via secure payment (no card details stored)
- *So that* I can unlock unlimited uploads & email reports without worrying about data breaches

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ✅ User can select Pro plan, enter email, and complete Razorpay payment in <2 min
- ✅ Subscription status updates in Supabase within 5 seconds of payment webhook
- ✅ Pro features (batch uploads, reports) immediately unlock without page reload

**Effort:** **M (3-5 days)**

**Why Now:**
- Free tier will cap users at 5 uploads/month starting July 1
- Need revenue-ready system before marketing push
- Razorpay handles PCI compliance (we never touch card data)

**Tech Details:**
```
File: app/api/payments/razorpay/route.ts
- Create order (amount, receipt_id, notes)
- Return order_id + key to frontend
- Handle Razorpay webhook (payment.authorized, payment.failed)
```

---

### 2. **Email Reports (Feature Lock)**
**User Story:**
- *As a* freelancer/contractor
- *I want* to receive weekly expense summaries via email
- *So that* I can track spending trends without logging in

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ✅ User can set preferred day/time for report generation
- ✅ Report includes: category breakdown, top 5 transactions, month-over-month change %
- ✅ Email sends via SendGrid with branded template (no dev emails)

**Effort:** **M (4 days)**

**Why Now:**
- High retention driver (users check email daily)
- Low-effort upsell to Pro tier
- Builds toward WhatsApp alerts roadmap

**Tech Details:**
```
Files: 
- lib/email/generateReport.ts (aggregate data)
- app/api/cron/sendWeeklyReports.ts (Vercel Cron Jobs)
- components/settings/EmailPreferences.tsx (UI)
```

---

### 3. **Mobile File Upload (UX Fix)**
**User Story:**
- *As a* mobile user on iOS
- *I want* to tap a button and upload bank statements from my phone's camera/files
- *So that* I can analyze spending on-the-go without a desktop

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ✅ Camera upload works on iOS Safari + Android Chrome (tested physical devices)
- ✅ Large PDFs (<20MB) compress before upload; progress bar shows status
- ✅ File picker shows recent files first; drag-drop alternative on web

**Effort:** **M (4 days)**

**Why Now:**
- 40%+ traffic is mobile (analytics show high bounce on upload)
- India market = mobile-first; can't require desktop
- Differentiator vs Rocket Money (desktop-centric)

**Tech Details:**
```
Files:
- components/FileUpload.tsx (refactor with React Dropzone)
- lib/fileHandler/compressFile.ts (PDF compression)
- app/api/upload/route.ts (chunked upload)
```

---

## PAYMENT INTEGRATION PLAN

### **Database Schema Changes** (Supabase)

```sql
-- New table: subscriptions
CREATE TABLE subscriptions (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users(id),
  tier TEXT DEFAULT 'free' CHECK (tier IN ('free', 'pro')),
  razorpay_subscription_id TEXT UNIQUE,
  razorpay_customer_id TEXT UNIQUE,
  status TEXT DEFAULT 'active' CHECK (status IN ('active', 'paused', 'cancelled')),
  current_period_start TIMESTAMP,
  current_period_end TIMESTAMP,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Add to existing users table
ALTER TABLE auth.users ADD COLUMN tier TEXT DEFAULT 'free';
ALTER TABLE auth.users ADD COLUMN uploads_this_month INT DEFAULT 0;
ALTER TABLE auth.users ADD COLUMN last_upload_reset TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW();

-- Payment events audit trail
CREATE TABLE payment_events (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  subscription_id UUID REFERENCES subscriptions(id),
  event_type TEXT NOT NULL, -- payment.authorized, payment.failed, subscription.activated
  razorpay_event_id TEXT UNIQUE,
  razorpay_payload JSONB,

);

# LEAKLY — WEEKLY TECH & PRODUCT REVIEW
**Date: June 22 | Sprint: 2 weeks**

---

## 🎯 SPRINT PRIORITIES (Next 2 Weeks)

### **PRIORITY 1: Email Report Generation**
**User Story:**
As a *finance manager*, I want to *receive automated weekly bank statement summaries via email*, so that *I can review spending trends without logging in*.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ✅ User can enable/disable email reports in settings (weekly/monthly cadence)
- ✅ Email contains: total spend, top 5 categories, anomalies flagged, PDF attachment
- ✅ Reports are sent at scheduled time (configurable timezone)

**Effort:** **M (3-5 days)**
- Email template design + SendGrid integration: 1.5 days
- Cron job (edge functions or external): 1.5 days
- Testing + deployment: 1 day

**Why Now:**
- Increases LTV (reduces churn — users stay engaged without active logins)
- Differentiates from competitors (Rocket Money = app-only alerts)
- High-value for B2B (accounting firms want automated client reports)

---

### **PRIORITY 2: Category Rules Engine (Smart Categorization)**
**User Story:**
As a *small business owner*, I want to *teach Leakly to auto-categorize recurring transactions* (e.g., "Slack → Software", "Whole Foods → Office Supplies"), so that *my reports are accurate without manual tagging*.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ✅ Users can create 10+ custom rules (regex + exact match patterns)
- ✅ Rules apply retroactively to uploaded statements
- ✅ Edit/delete rules without re-uploading files

**Effort:** **M (3-5 days)**
- DB schema (rules table + user_id foreign key): 0.5 day
- Rules engine (regex matcher in TypeScript): 1 day
- UI (form + rule list with edit/delete): 1.5 days
- Re-processing pipeline for existing transactions: 1 day

**Why Now:**
- Reduces manual data cleanup (biggest user friction point)
- Enables accurate forecasting → upsell Pro tier
- Required before WhatsApp alerts (alerts need correct categories)

---

### **PRIORITY 3: Multi-File Upload & Session Persistence**
**User Story:**
As a *freelancer*, I want to *upload 3 months of statements at once and have them persist in my account*, so that *I can compare spending trends across time periods*.

- ✅ Drag-and-drop multiple files (PDF/CSV/Excel) in one session

title: Tech review — June 21
output:
# LEAKLY — Weekly Tech & Product Review
**Date: June 21 | Sprint: Next 2 weeks**

---

## SPRINT PRIORITIES (Next 2 Weeks)

### 1. **Email Report Generation & Delivery**
**User Story:**
> As a privacy-conscious CFO, I want automated weekly PDF reports emailed to me so that I can share insights with my team without uploading files repeatedly.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Users can configure report frequency (weekly/monthly) + recipient emails in settings
- System generates PDF with spending breakdown, anomalies, category trends
- Email successfully delivered to up to 5 recipients (Pro plan limit)

**Effort:** M (3-5 days)

**Why Now:**
- Highest-leverage retention feature (increases weekly engagement by ~35%)
- Enables sharing without re-uploading (solves friction point from user feedback)
- Required for Pro plan differentiation vs. free tier

**Tech Stack:** Resend API + React PDF lib + Supabase cron (pg_cron extension)

---

### 2. **Category Rules Engine (Smart Categorization)**
**User Story:**
> As a small business owner, I want to auto-categorize recurring transactions (e.g., "Amazon" → Shopping) so that I can instantly see spending patterns without manual tagging.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- System learns from user's manual tags and applies rules to future imports
- Rules editable: "if description contains 'AWS' → Cloud Services"
- Accuracy >85% for top 10 merchant categories (validated by test dataset)

**Effort:** M (3-5 days)

**Why Now:**
- Removes biggest UX friction (manual categorization is tedious)
- Increases stickiness (users stay to refine rules vs. abandon)
- Foundation for WhatsApp alerts (need reliable categories first)

**Tech Stack:** Fuzzy-match (fuse.js) + Supabase vectors (for semantic matching) + Rules table in DB

---

### 3. **Multi-File Upload Optimization**
**User Story:**
> As a busy accountant, I want to upload 5+ bank statements at once so that I can process quarterly data in seconds instead of individual uploads.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Drag-drop multiple CSV/Excel/PDF files simultaneously
- Shows upload progress per file + consolidated summary
- Handles duplicate transactions across files (deduplication logic)

**Effort:** S (2 days)

**Why Now:**
- Reduces friction for target ICP (accounting firms) by 60%
- Enables B2B enterprise trial (load test with 50+ files/month)
- Low effort, high impact on conversion metrics

**Tech Stack:** React Dropzone + Parallel file parsing (Web Workers) + Supabase batch inserts

---

## PAYMENT INTEGRATION PLAN: Razorpay (India) + Stripe (US)

### Database Schema Changes
```sql
-- New tables
CREATE TABLE subscriptions (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users,
  plan_id VARCHAR (e.g., 'pro_monthly', 'pro_annual'),
  provider ENUM ('razorpay', 'stripe'),
  provider_subscription_id VARCHAR, -- Razorpay: sub_123, Stripe: sub_456
  status ENUM ('active', 'paused', 'canceled'),
  current_period_start TIMESTAMP,
  current_period_end TIMESTAMP,
  amount_cents INTEGER,
  currency VARCHAR (e.g., 'INR', 'USD'),
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE TABLE payment_events (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,
  subscription_id UUID REFERENCES subscriptions,
  event_type VARCHAR (e.g., 'payment.success', 'subscription.paused'),
  provider_event_id VARCHAR,
  provider_timestamp TIMESTAMP,
  raw_payload JSONB,
  processed BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT now()
);

-- Add to auth.users
ALTER TABLE auth.users ADD COLUMN (
  stripe_customer_id VARCHAR,
  razorpay_customer_id VARCHAR,
  preferred_payment_provider VARCHAR,
  billing_country VARCHAR
);
```

### API Endpoints

| Endpoint | Method | Purpose | Auth |
|----------|--------|---------|------|
| `/api/billing/checkout` | POST | Create Razorpay/Stripe session | User JWT |
| `/api/billing/subscribe` | POST | Finalize subscription after checkout | User JWT |
| `/api/billing/cancel` | POST | Cancel subscription (with refund logic) | User JWT |
| `/api/billing/portal` | GET | Redirect to billing portal | User JWT |
| `/api/webhooks/razorpay` | POST | Handle Razorpay events | Signature validation |
| `/api/webhooks/stripe` | POST | Handle Stripe events | Signature validation |
| `/api/billing/plans` | GET | List active plans (

title: Tech review — June 21
output:
# LEAKLY TECH & PRODUCT REVIEW — June 21

---

## SPRINT PRIORITIES (Next 2 Weeks)

### **1. Razorpay Payment Integration (Pro Tier Unlock)**

**User Story:**
As a US/India user, I want to upgrade to Pro via secure payment so that I unlock unlimited uploads & email reports without manual billing.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Checkout page displays INR/USD pricing, card/UPI payment flows work end-to-end
- Successful payment creates `subscription` record in Supabase with `status: active`, `plan: pro`, `expires_at` timestamp
- Failed/webhook timeout triggers retry logic; user sees "payment pending" state (not stuck)

**Effort:** `M` (3-5 days)

**Why Now:**
- Free tier monetization blocked. Revenue $0. Competitors (Rocket Money, Copilot) all charge. Pro features (WhatsApp alerts, email reports) are built—just need payment gate.
- India market entry requires Razorpay (Stripe unavailable). US requires Stripe. Two-provider approach = 80% coverage.

**Tech Notes:**
- Use Razorpay Standard Checkout (easier than API; PCI-compliant).
- Webhook verifies payment → triggers `create_subscription()` function in Supabase (pgSQL).

---

### **2. Email Reports (Daily/Weekly Digest)**

**User Story:**
As a busy CFO, I want automated email summaries of my spending (categories, top merchants, anomalies) so that I don't need to log into Leakly daily.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- User toggles "Email Reports" (daily/weekly/off) in settings; preference stored in `profiles` table
- Cron job runs at 6 AM UTC (Edge Function or Vercel Cron) → queries uploaded statements → generates HTML email (Resend/SendGrid)
- Email includes: total spend, top 5 categories, unusual transactions (>2σ from mean), unread alerts count

**Effort:** `M` (3-5 days)

**Why Now:**
- Roadmap item. Differentiator vs. competitors (Rocket Money doesn't summarize PDFs—just bank feeds). High engagement → higher retention → Pro upsell.
- Pairs with Razorpay (Pro feature = "unlimited reports").

**Tech Notes:**
- Use Vercel Cron (free, no external service). Schedule daily at `0 6 * * *` (UTC).
- Resend (Vercel-native) for email; React Email for component-based templates.

---

### **3. Bank Account Aggregation (BA) API Prep**

**User Story:**
As a retail user, I want to connect my bank account directly (not upload PDFs) so that I get real-time spending alerts & categorization without manual uploads.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- API endpoint `/api/bank-aa/auth` returns OAuth redirect to Setu (India BA aggregator)
- User grants permission → Setu webhook posts account data to `/api/bank-aa/webhook`
- Raw transactions stored in `bank_transactions` table; category inference runs async via pgSQL function

**Effort:** `L` (1+ week, but start scaffolding now)

**Why Now:**
- Roadmap item. Setu + RBI mandates make it India's future. Starting integration now = Q3 launch vs. Q4.
- Unlocks subscription model: "Real-time insights" = premium feature.
- Validates product–market fit (if users adopt BA, PDF upload becomes legacy).

**Tech Notes:**
- Don't build BA UI yet—just backend plumbing.
- Setu credentials in env vars. Webhook signature verification critical (HMAC-SHA256).

---

## PAYMENT INTEGRATION PLAN: Razorpay (India) + Stripe (US)

### **Database Changes**

```sql
-- New table: subscriptions
CREATE TABLE subscriptions (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users(id),
  plan TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (plan IN ('free', 'pro')), -- free/pro
  status TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (status IN ('active', 'inactive', 'pending', 'failed')), 
  provider TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (provider IN ('razorpay', 'stripe')), -- which payment system
  provider_subscription_id TEXT UNIQUE, -- razorpay_sub_id or stripe_sub_id
  amount_cents INT NOT NULL, -- store in cents: 999 = $9.99 or ₹999
  currency TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (currency IN ('INR', 'USD')), -- INR for India, USD for US
  billing_cycle_start TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,
  billing_cycle_end TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,
  next_billing_date TIMESTAMPTZ,
  auto_renew BOOLEAN DEFAULT true,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ

title: Tech review — June 21
output:
# LEAKLY WEEKLY TECH REVIEW — June 21

---

## SPRINT PRIORITIES (Next 2 weeks)

### **1. CSV/Excel Duplicate Detection & Smart Categorization**

**User Story:**
As a user analyzing 6 months of bank statements, I want Leakly to automatically detect duplicate transactions and suggest category tags (groceries, subscriptions, utilities) so that I spend <5 min reviewing instead of 30 min manually.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Upload 3-file multi-statement CSV → system flags >90% of duplicates (same amount ± $0.50, same date ± 1 day, same merchant within 15 days)
- ML-based categorization suggests 1 of 15 categories with confidence score; user confirms/rejects in 1 click
- Duplicate report exports showing "removed" transactions + cost savings summary (e.g., "Found $247 in duplicate coffee charges")

**Effort:** M (3-5 days)
- Day 1: Duplicate detection logic + matching algorithm
- Day 2-3: Category classifier (fine-tune tiny BERT or use rule-based regex patterns for common merchants)
- Day 4: UI for review + bulk confirm/reject
- Day 5: Export report generation

**Why Now:**
- Free tier users complain about manual tagging friction (support feedback from first 50 users)
- Converts casual users → paid; Pro plan can include "AI auto-category" as premium feature
- Privacy-first angle: all processing client-side or Supabase edge functions (no third-party categorization APIs)

---

### **2. Razorpay Payment Gateway + Subscription Management**

**User Story:**
As a US user in India or Indian accountant, I want to upgrade to Pro tier using local payment methods (UPI, netbanking) and see my subscription status/renewal date so that I don't get surprised by charges.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Razorpay checkout flow: free user clicks "Upgrade" → pay ₹499/mo or $7/mo → receives email receipt + Pro badge on dashboard
- Subscription status page shows: plan name, renewal date, usage (files uploaded: 5/∞), option to cancel
- Webhook handles: payment.authorized, payment.failed, subscription.charged, subscription.ended → updates `subscriptions` table

**Effort:** M (3-5 days)
- Day 1: Razorpay API integration + keys setup
- Day 2: Database schema + `/api/checkout`, `/api/webhook/razorpay`
- Day 3: Frontend checkout modal + success/error handling
- Day 4: Subscription status UI + renewal logic
- Day 5: Testing + edge cases (failed renewal, refunds)

**Why Now:**
- Revenue blocker; can't monetize without payment processor
- Razorpay chosen over Stripe initially (80% of target is India; lower fees there)
- Free tier users ready to convert (organic traction suggests product-market fit)

---

### **3. Email Report Export + Scheduled Delivery**

**User Story:**
As a CFO reviewing Leakly monthly trends, I want to schedule automated email reports (cash flow summary, top expenses, anomalies) every 1st of the month so that I get insights without logging in.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- User selects: report type (summary/detailed), frequency (weekly/monthly), email address
- Report includes: total spend, top 5 categories, month-over-month change %, anomaly flags (e.g., "3x normal Uber spend")
- Email renders beautifully (Resend or SendGrid); includes 1 interactive chart (PDF fallback if image rendering fails)

**Effort:** M (3-5 days)
- Day 1: Report generation logic (query Supabase, aggregate metrics)
- Day 2: Email template design + SendGrid/Resend integration
- Day 3: Cron job (Supabase pg_cron or Vercel cron)
- Day 4: User preferences UI + database schema
- Day 5: Testing + edge cases (timezone, missing data)

**Why Now:**
- Engagement lever: active emails → stickiness → lower churn
- Roadmap item; needed before "WhatsApp alerts" (lower priority)
- Low effort; unblocks retention analysis

---

## PAYMENT INTEGRATION PLAN: Razorpay + Stripe

### **Database Changes**

```sql
-- New tables
CREATE TABLE subscriptions (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id UUID NOT NULL (FK users),
  plan_id TEXT NOT NULL ('pro', 'enterprise'),
  status TEXT NOT NULL ('active', 'past_due', 'canceled', 'expired'),
  razorpay_subscription_id TEXT UNIQUE,
  stripe_subscription_id TEXT UNIQUE,
  current_period_start TIMESTAMPTZ,
  current_period_end TIMESTAMPTZ,
  renewal_date TIMESTAMPTZ,
  amount_cents INT,
  currency TEXT ('INR', 'USD'),
  created

title: Tech review — June 21
output:
# LEAKLY TECH & PRODUCT REVIEW — June 21

---

## SPRINT PRIORITIES (Next 2 Weeks)

### **1. Razorpay Payment Integration (Upgrade to Pro)**

**User Story:**
As a US/India-based user, I want to upgrade to Pro via one-click payment so that I can analyze unlimited bank statements without manual payment confirmation delays.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] User clicks "Upgrade to Pro" → Razorpay modal opens → payment completes → user sees "Pro active" badge within 2 seconds
- [ ] Webhook from Razorpay updates `user.subscription_tier` and `user.subscription_expires_at` in real-time
- [ ] Failed payment shows clear error; user can retry without losing session

**Effort:** **M (3-5 days)**

**Why Now:**
- Free tier driving signups but 0% conversion. Payment friction is the blocker.
- India expansion requires Razorpay (Stripe unavailable for most Indians).
- Revenue model blocked until this ships.

---

### **2. Email Report Generation (Weekly Statement Summary)**

**User Story:**
As a busy CFO, I want to receive a weekly email summarizing my bank statement trends (top expenses, balance change, cash flow pattern) so that I don't have to log in daily to stay updated.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] On Monday 9 AM IST/EST, async job generates PDF report with charts (expense breakdown pie chart, balance trend line graph)
- [ ] Email includes CTA button: "View Full Analysis" → links to latest upload in Leakly
- [ ] User can toggle email frequency (weekly/monthly/off) in settings

**Effort:** **M (4-5 days)**
- 1 day: Cron job setup (pg_cron in Supabase or external worker)
- 2 days: Chart generation + PDF rendering (use `react-pdf` + `recharts`)
- 1 day: Email service integration (SendGrid or AWS SES)
- 1 day: Settings UI + subscription logic

**Why Now:**
- Email is highest-trust touchpoint. Builds habit loop.
- Reduces churn (users who email-loop have 10x better retention).
- Uses existing data—no new infrastructure.

---

### **3. WhatsApp Alert for Anomalies (Cash Crisis Detection)**

**User Story:**
As an accounting firm owner, I want to receive a WhatsApp alert when a client's balance drops >30% month-over-month so that I can proactively flag cash flow issues to them.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] First upload triggers anomaly scan; if `balance_drop_pct > 30%`, WhatsApp message sent within 30 seconds
- [ ] Alert includes: client name, balance change ($X → $Y), actionable suggestion ("Review payroll vs. revenue")
- [ ] User can set threshold % and exclude certain accounts (e.g., payroll holding account)

**Effort:** **M (4-5 days)**
- 1 day: Anomaly detection logic (SQL function in Supabase)
- 2 days: Twilio WhatsApp integration + webhook handling
- 1 day: Settings UI (threshold slider, exclude list)
- 1 day: Testing + error handling

**Why Now:**
- OpsRunner (B2B accounting tool) needs this for client dashboards.
- Whatsapp has 500M+ India users; SMS is dying.
- Differentiator vs. Rocket Money (no alerts).

---

## PAYMENT INTEGRATION PLAN

### **Architecture: Razorpay (India) + Stripe (US)**

```sql
-- 1. DATABASE CHANGES (Supabase migrations)

-- Add subscription columns to 'users' table
ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN (
  subscription_tier VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'free', -- 'free' | 'pro'
  subscription_expires_at TIMESTAMP,
  stripe_customer_id VARCHAR(100),
  razorpay_customer_id VARCHAR(100),
  preferred_payment_gateway VARCHAR(20) -- 'razorpay' | 'stripe'
);

-- New table: Payment transactions (audit trail)
CREATE TABLE payment_transactions (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  user_id UUID REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  gateway VARCHAR(20), -- 'razorpay' | 'stripe'
  gateway_payment_id VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE,
  amount_usd DECIMAL(10,2),
  status VARCHAR(20), -- 'pending' | 'success' | 'failed'
  error_message TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP
);

-- RLS policies
ALTER TABLE payment_transactions ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
CREATE POLICY "users_see_own_payments" 
  ON payment_transactions FOR SELECT 
  USING (auth.uid() = user_id);
```

title: Tech review — June 20
output:
# LEAKLY WEEKLY TECH REVIEW — June 20

---

## SPRINT PRIORITIES (Next 2 Weeks)

### **#1: CSV/Excel Multi-File Batch Upload**
**User Story:**  
As a busy accountant, I want to upload 3-5 bank statements at once so that I analyze quarterly spending in one session instead of five separate uploads.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Drag-drop or file picker accepts up to 5 files (≤50MB total)
- Progress bar shows individual file parsing status
- Results aggregated in single dashboard view with file source labels

**Effort:** `M (3-5 days)`

**Why Now:**  
- OpsRunner target (accounting firms) needs batch workflows. Single-upload UX is friction point during trials.
- Razorpay integration lands next sprint; batch feature drives Pro tier upgrade justification.

---

### **#2: Smart Spending Insights (AI Analysis)**
**User Story:**  
As a freelancer, I want Leakly to automatically categorize transactions and flag anomalies so that I find cost-leak patterns without manual review.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Auto-categorize 95%+ transactions (Food, SaaS, Travel, Other)
- Highlight top 3 "spike" transactions month-over-month
- Explain each anomaly in plain English (e.g., "Amazon spending +340% vs May")

**Effort:** `L (1+ week)` 
  - 3 days: Prompt engineering + Claude API integration (use existing Anthropic setup if any)
  - 2 days: Category training data + eval
  - 2 days: Frontend cards + mobile responsiveness

**Why Now:**  
- Free tier must differentiate from Rocket Money (bank login fatigue). AI insights = stickiness.
- US market expects intelligence, not raw data.

---

### **#3: Email Summary Reports (Weekly Digest)**
**User Story:**  
As a busy CFO, I want a weekly email showing my top spending categories and budget health so that I stay informed without logging in.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Automated 7-day summary (Mon 9 AM user's timezone)
- Shows: Total spend, top 3 categories, biggest transaction, savings tip
- Unsubscribe link + link back to dashboard (analytics)

**Effort:** `M (3-5 days)`
  - 1 day: Cron job (use Vercel Functions or external service like Trigger.dev)
  - 1 day: Email template (HTML) + Resend integration
  - 1.5 days: User timezone logic + scheduling UI
  - 0.5 days: Tests + monitoring

**Why Now:**  
- Roadmap commitment (email reports listed). Builds engagement for Pro tier (upsell: WhatsApp alerts next).
- Low-lift retention play before mobile app.

---

## PAYMENT INTEGRATION PLAN

### **Razorpay (India) + Stripe (US)**

#### **Database Changes**
```sql
-- Extend users table
ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN (
  stripe_customer_id VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE,
  razorpay_customer_id VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE,
  subscription_tier VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'free', -- free, pro
  subscription_status VARCHAR(50), -- active, cancelled, past_due
  billing_cycle_anchor BIGINT, -- Unix timestamp for renewal
  country_code CHAR(2) DEFAULT 'US' -- detect from IP/signup
);

-- New payments table (audit trail)
CREATE TABLE payments (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  provider VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, -- 'stripe' | 'razorpay'
  provider_payment_id VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  amount_cents BIGINT NOT NULL,

);

title: Tech review — June 20

# LEAKLY — WEEKLY TECH & PRODUCT REVIEW
**June 20 | Next 2 Weeks Sprint**

---

## SPRINT PRIORITIES (Next 2 Weeks)

### **#1: CSV/Excel Multi-Sheet Upload Handler**
**User Story:**  
As a small business owner, I want to upload multi-sheet Excel files (Checking + Savings accounts in one file) so that I don't have to upload each account separately.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ✅ Parse .xlsx files with multiple sheets; auto-detect sheet names and map to accounts
- ✅ Show preview of detected sheets before processing; allow user to skip irrelevant sheets
- ✅ Process all sheets in parallel without timeout; progress bar updates per sheet

**Effort:** `M (3-5 days)`

**Why Now:**
- Top user friction point in onboarding (manual workaround = 20% drop-off)
- Easy differentiation vs. Rocket Money (they require login; we accept files)
- India market heavily uses Excel; US firms upload consolidated sheets

**Tech Notes:**
- Use `xlsx` library (already in stack) → parse with `XLSX.read()`
- Store each sheet as separate `bank_statement` row with `source_sheet_name`
- Add `batch_id` to link multi-sheet uploads for analytics

---

### **#2: Transaction Categorization Rules Engine**
**User Story:**  
As a CFO reviewing monthly statements, I want to define custom rules (if description contains "AWS" → categorize as Cloud Services) so that recurring transactions auto-categorize and save 30 mins/month.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ✅ UI to create rules: [field] [operator] [value] → [category] (max 50 rules/user)
- ✅ Rules apply to new uploads automatically; retroactive apply toggle for past data
- ✅ Rule conflicts handled gracefully (first match wins; show warning)

**Effort:** `M (3-5 days)`

**Why Now:**
- Enables Pro plan upsell (free = manual tagging; Pro = rules engine)
- OPSRUNNER integration needs clean categorized data
- QBO/Xero users already expect this (competitive parity)

**Tech Notes:**
- New table: `categorization_rules` (user_id, field, operator, value, category, order, active)
- New endpoint: `POST /api/rules` + `PUT /api/rules/[id]`
- Add rule engine to transaction processing pipeline (middleware)

---

### **#3: Email Report Scheduling (Roadmap Item)**
**User Story:**  
As an accounting firm principal, I want to schedule weekly summaries emailed to clients (spending by category, top 10 transactions, month-over-month change) so that I reduce client support emails.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ✅ Schedule picker: weekly (Mon-Fri), monthly (1st/15th); select time zone
- ✅ Email template with branded header, summary stats, and drill-down links
- ✅ Track opens/clicks; log delivery failures; manual retry button

**Effort:** `L (6-8 days)`

**Why Now:**
- Critical for OPSRUNNER accounting firm workflow (reduces manual reporting)
- High retention signal (weekly touch = 60% higher churn resistance)
- Pairs with #1 & #2 (rules engine + multi-sheet = better reports)

**Tech Notes:**
- Use Resend.com or SendGrid (Vercel-friendly); preference: **Resend** (simpler)
- New table: `email_schedules` (user_id, frequency, day_of_week, time_zone, template_id, last_sent, next_run)
- Background job: Vercel Cron or Bull queue (recommend Bull on Redis for reliability)

---

  payment_provider TEXT NOT NULL ('razorpay' | 'stripe'),
