# WEEKLY TECH & PRODUCT REVIEW — LEAKLY
**Date: June 20 | Week: Sprint 25**

---

## SPRINT PRIORITIES (Next 2 Weeks)

### 1. **Email Report Export (Scheduled Insights)**
**User Story:**  
As a *freelance accountant*, I want to *receive weekly email summaries of spending categories and anomalies*, so that *I can review financial trends without logging in each time*.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Users can set email frequency (weekly/bi-weekly/monthly) in account settings
- Email includes top 5 spending categories, largest transactions, and month-over-month delta
- Email delivery succeeds 99.5% (logged in Supabase analytics)

**Effort:** M (3-5 days)

**Why Now:**  
Free users churn after 2-3 uploads. Email keeps product sticky. Pro plan upsell: "Premium reports" at $4.99/mo. Low CAC multiplication.

**Tech Stack:**
- Resend API (better than SendGrid for transactional) + React Email template
- Cronjob: Vercel Cron (free tier)
- Schema: `user_preferences.email_frequency`, `audit_log.email_sent_at`

---

### 2. **WhatsApp Alert for Unusual Transactions (Real-time Risk)**
**User Story:**  
As a *small business owner*, I want to *receive a WhatsApp message when a transaction exceeds my custom threshold*, so that *I catch fraud or errors immediately*.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- User defines transaction threshold ($500–$50K) in dashboard
- Alert fires within 60 seconds of statement upload
- User can reply "mute" to disable alerts for 24h

**Effort:** M (3-5 days)

**Why Now:**  
Differentiator vs. Rocket Money (email-only). India market loves WhatsApp. Pro feature = $2.99/mo. Validates product-market fit.

**Tech Stack:**
- Twilio WhatsApp API (≈$0.01/msg)
- Real-time: Supabase Realtime + Edge Function
- Schema: `user_alerts.threshold`, `transaction_flags.flagged_at`

---

### 3. **Bank Account Aggregation (AA API Integration)**
**User Story:**

title: Tech review — June 19
output:
# LEAKLY — Weekly Tech & Product Review
**June 19 | Sprint Planning + Execution Path**

---

## SPRINT PRIORITIES (Next 2 Weeks)

### 1. **CSV/Excel Bank Statement Parser (Smart Column Detection)**
**User Story:**  
*As a busy CFO, I want Leakly to auto-detect transaction columns (Date, Amount, Description) from messy bank exports so that I don't manually map 50+ columns.*

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ✅ Parser detects and validates Date, Debit, Credit, Balance columns with 95%+ accuracy (tested on 20+ real bank formats: HDFC, ICICI, Chase, Bank of America)
- ✅ Users see confidence scores per column + option to manually override before upload processes
- ✅ Transactions correctly categorized into Expense/Income/Transfer within 2 seconds for 5MB+ files

**Effort:** **M (3–5 days)**

**Why Now:**  
- 60% of free tier users upload Excel/CSV but abandon due to format friction
- Directly feeds revenue metric: Pro conversion rate
- Technical blocker for India expansion (Razorpay won't activate without transaction clarity)

**Technical Notes:**
```typescript
// apps/leakly/lib/parsers/bankStatementParser.ts
export interface ColumnDetectionResult {
  date: { column: string; confidence: 0-100; format: string };
  amount: { debit?: string; credit?: string; combined?: string };
  description: string;
  balance?: string;
}

// Use: heuristics (fuzzy match on headers) + ML (tiny TensorFlow.js model trained on 500 statement samples)
```

---

### 2. **Transaction Categorization Engine + Spending Dashboard**
**User Story:**  
*As a self-employed contractor, I want my transactions auto-tagged (Client Payments, Tax, Supplies, Meals) and visualized in a spending dashboard so that I can spot irregular spending in 10 seconds.*

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ✅ ML classifier achieves 85%+ accuracy on category prediction (Fine-tuned on 10K+ labeled transactions from beta users)
- ✅ Dashboard shows: Month-over-month spending trends, top 5 expense categories, anomaly detection (red flags on unusual spikes)
- ✅ Users can train custom categories via thumbs-up/down feedback (model improves per account)

**Effort:** **M (4–5 days)**

**Why Now:**  
- Direct upsell for Pro tier ($9.99/mo → $19.99/mo when dashboard launches)
- Opsrunner integration requires clean categorical data (80% cost reduction claim depends on this)
- Mobile roadmap depends on this being 100% reliable

**Technical Notes:**
```typescript
// apps/leakly/lib/ml/categorizer.ts

# LEAKLY TECH & PRODUCT REVIEW — JUNE 19

---

## SPRINT PRIORITIES (Next 2 Weeks)

### **#1: Razorpay Payment Integration (India)**
**User Story:**
As a privacy-conscious Indian accountant, I want to upgrade from free to Pro via Razorpay so that I don't expose my banking credentials to payment gateways that require bank login.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- User can select "Upgrade to Pro" → Razorpay checkout opens → payment succeeds → Pro features unlock instantly
- Failed payment shows clear error; user can retry without data loss
- Invoice PDF emailed within 2 min of successful payment (use Resend API)

**Effort:** M (3-5 days)

**Why Now:**
- India is 40% of free users (based on Vercel analytics)
- Razorpay has lowest friction for Indian users vs Stripe (no UPI support in Stripe yet)
- Revenue unlock: ₹299/mo Pro tier targets 50+ accountant SMBs in India

---

### **#2: Email Report Scheduling**
**User Story:**
As a CFO running monthly close, I want to schedule automated bank statement summaries emailed every Monday at 9 AM so that I review spending trends without manual uploads.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- User configures frequency (weekly/bi-weekly/monthly) + time in account settings
- Cron job (via Supabase PgBoss or Vercel Cron) triggers PDF generation + Resend email
- Email contains: top spend categories, anomalies flagged, downloadable CSV export

**Effort:** M (4 days)

**Why Now:**
- #1 feature request from beta users (3/5 feedback forms)
- Reduces churn (scheduled reports = habit formation)
- Differentiates vs Rocket Money (manual upload only)

---

### **#3: WhatsApp Alerts for Suspicious Spending**
**User Story:**
As a business owner, I want WhatsApp notifications when spending exceeds thresholds (e.g., >$5K in one transaction) so that I catch fraud in real-time without checking the app daily.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- User sets alert thresholds per category in settings (default: $5K general, $2K recurring)
- Twilio WhatsApp API sends alert within 60 sec of CSV upload
- Alert includes: transaction amount, merchant, category, one-tap link to full statement

**Effort:** M (3-4 days)

**Why Now:**
- Payment integration complete → new users coming → need engagement hooks
- B2B pain point: CFOs need real-time fraud detection

-- New table: invoices
CREATE TABLE invoices (

  amount_cents INT,
  currency VARCHAR, -- 'INR' | 'USD'
  provider VARCHAR,
  provider_invoice_id VARCHAR,
  pdf_url VARCHAR,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
);
```

title: Tech review — June 19
output:
# LEAKLY — Weekly Tech & Product Review
**Date: June 19 | Sprint: 2 weeks**

---

## SPRINT PRIORITIES (Next 2 Weeks)

### 1. **CSV/Excel Parser Enhancement**
**User Story:**
> As a small business owner, I want to upload multi-sheet Excel files with custom date/amount formats so that I don't have to manually clean data before analysis.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ✅ Parse XLS, XLSX with multiple sheets; auto-detect active sheet or prompt user
- ✅ Detect 5+ date formats (DD/MM/YY, MM-DD-YYYY, text months) + currency symbols ($, ₹, €)
- ✅ Show preview of parsed rows (5 samples) before processing; allow column mapping UI

**Effort:** **M (3-5 days)**
**Why now:** 
- 40% of free tier users upload Excel (bank exports vary by region)
- Reduces support tickets on "my data didn't import"
- Prerequisite for WhatsApp alerts feature (needs reliable parsing)

**Tech stack:** 
```
- Library: `xlsx` + `date-fns`
- New endpoint: POST /api/upload/preview
- Store mapping rules in Supabase: user_upload_preferences
```

---

### 2. **Email Report Generation**
**User Story:**
> As a CFO, I want weekly email summaries of spending trends and anomalies so that I can monitor finances without logging in.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ✅ Generate PDF/HTML reports: top 5 expense categories, month-over-month growth, flagged transactions
- ✅ Schedule weekly emails (Monday 9 AM user's timezone) + manual trigger
- ✅ Unsubscribe link + report customization (which sections to include)

**Effort:** **M (4-5 days)**
**Why now:**
- Justifies Pro tier ($5-8/mo) — retention lever
- Pairs with Razorpay integration (paid feature)
- Low-hanging fruit: reuse existing analysis engine

**Tech stack:**
```
- Service: Resend or SendGrid (Resend free tier: 100 emails/day)
- Job scheduling: Supabase Edge Functions or Bull queue (Redis)
- Template: React Email (JSX-based email HTML)
```

---

### 3. **Transaction Categorization Rules Engine**
**User Story:**
> As an accountant, I want to set custom rules (e.g., "if description contains 'AWS' → Cloud Expenses") so that categorization is accurate without manual tagging.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ✅ Create 3+ rules via UI: regex/contains/exact match on description, amount range, payee
- ✅ Apply rules retroactively to existing transactions
- ✅ Rule conflict detection (warn if 2 rules match same transaction)

**Effort:** **M (4 days)**
**Why now:**
- Core value prop: saves 2-3 hours/month per user
- Differentiates vs. Rocket Money (rule logic buried in UI)
- Enables OpsRunner integration (accountants need this)

**Tech stack:**
```
- DB: categorization_rules table + rule_matches junction
- Engine: Simple rule evaluator (TypeScript, no ML yet)
- UI: React Form Builder pattern
```

---

## PAYMENT INTEGRATION PLAN
**Razorpay (India) + Stripe (US)**

### Database Schema Changes
```sql
-- New tables
CREATE TABLE subscriptions (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users,
  plan_id ENUM ('free', 'pro', 'business'),
  status ENUM ('active', 'cancelled', 'past_due'),
  current_period_start TIMESTAMP,
  current_period_end TIMESTAMP,
  razorpay_subscription_id TEXT,
  stripe_subscription_id TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE TABLE payment_events (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,
  subscription_id UUID REFERENCES subscriptions,
  event_type ENUM ('charge.success', 'charge.failed', 'subscription.cancel'),
  gateway ENUM ('razorpay', 'stripe'),
  gateway_reference_id TEXT UNIQUE,
  amount DECIMAL(10,2),
  currency ENUM ('INR', 'USD'),
  processed_at TIMESTAMP,
  idempotency_key TEXT UNIQUE
);

ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN stripe_customer_id TEXT, razorpay_customer_id TEXT;
```

### API Endpoints
```
POST /api/payments/create-subscription
  - Body: { planId, paymentGateway ('razorpay'|'stripe') }
  - Returns: { paymentUrl, sessionId }
  
POST /api/payments/webhook/razorpay
  - Handles: subscription.authenticated, payment.captured, payment.failed
  
POST /api

title: Tech review — June 19
output:
# LEAKLY TECH & PRODUCT REVIEW — June 19

---

## SPRINT PRIORITIES (Next 2 Weeks)

### **1. Email Reports & Scheduled Exports**
**User Story:**  
As a *finance manager*, I want *automated weekly email reports of my spending categories* so that *I can review trends without logging in*.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- User can schedule reports (weekly/monthly) with custom categories + date ranges
- Email template includes: category breakdown, anomalies flagged, MoM % change
- Reports sent via Resend API with unsubscribe link + dashboard tracking

**Effort:** M (3-5 days)

**Why Now:** 
- Retention driver. Most churn = users forget the tool exists. Email = recurring engagement.
- Moves Leakly from "one-time upload" → "ongoing intelligence"
- Low CAC impact: builds stickiness for Pro conversion.

**Tech Stack:**
- Trigger: Node.js cron job (Supabase edge functions)
- Template: React email components
- Delivery: Resend API

---

### **2. WhatsApp Alerts (Budget Threshold)**
**User Story:**  
As a *small business owner*, I want *instant WhatsApp alerts when spending exceeds 80% of my monthly budget* so that *I can act immediately without checking email*.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- User sets budget thresholds per category (e.g., "Marketing: $5k/month")
- Webhook listens to new transactions; triggers Twilio WhatsApp if threshold exceeded
- Alert includes: category name, current spend, budget, % used (2 taps to dashboard)

**Effort:** M (4 days)

**Why Now:**
- US + India both use WhatsApp heavily. High engagement vs. email (95% read rate in 5min vs. 20% email).
- Differentiator vs. Rocket Money (no real-time alerts).
- Revenue lever: premium feature for Pro ($9.99/mo) → justifies $2/mo Twilio cost.

**Tech Stack:**
- Trigger: Supabase Postgres trigger + edge function
- Delivery: Twilio WhatsApp API
- DB: Add `alert_settings` table with thresholds per user/category

---

### **3. Bank Account Aggregation (Preview)**
**User Story:**  
As a *freelancer*, I want *to connect 2-3 bank accounts at once and see consolidated spending* so that *I don't have to upload 3 separate CSVs*.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- User can authorize up to 2 banks via Setu/RazorpayX account aggregation API (MVP: India only)
- Transactions auto-pull every 12h; deduplicated by reference number
- Dashboard shows combined balance + merged category view

**Effort:** L (6-8 days)

**Why Now:**
- Roadmap commitment. Competitive moat vs. Copilot (they require manual upload too).
- Product-market fit validator: if users activate this, it signals strong demand.
- Technical debt: requires new `connected_accounts` table + OAuth flow architecture.

**Tech Stack:**
- OAuth: Setu AA API (RBI-approved account aggregation)
- Sync: Temporal.io for reliable retry + scheduling
- DB: `connected_accounts`, `aggregated_transactions` tables

---

## PAYMENT INTEGRATION PLAN

### **Razorpay (India) + Stripe (US)**

#### **Database Changes**

```sql
-- subscriptions table
CREATE TABLE subscriptions (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users,
  plan_id VARCHAR (pro|enterprise), -- tier
  payment_provider VARCHAR (razorpay|stripe),
  provider_subscription_id VARCHAR, -- Razorpay: "sub_ABC123", Stripe: "sub_stripe_xyz"
  status VARCHAR (active|paused|cancelled),
  current_period_start TIMESTAMP,
  current_period_end TIMESTAMP,
  auto_renew BOOLEAN DEFAULT true,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP
);

-- payment_methods table
CREATE TABLE payment_methods (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users,
  provider_payment_method_id VARCHAR,
  provider VARCHAR (razorpay|stripe),
  card_last_4 VARCHAR,
  card_brand VARCHAR,
  is_default BOOLEAN,
  created_at TIMESTAMP
);

-- transactions table (audit trail)
CREATE TABLE payment_transactions (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,
  subscription_id UUID REFERENCES subscriptions,
  provider_transaction_id VARCHAR,
  amount INT, -- in paise/cents
  currency VARCHAR (INR|USD),
  status VARCHAR (pending|completed|failed|refunded),
  metadata JSONB, -- store invoice URL, attempt count, etc.
  created_at TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP
);

-- Add column to users table
ALTER TABLE auth

# LEAKLY — WEEKLY TECH & PRODUCT REVIEW
**Date: June 18 | Sprint: Next 2 Weeks**

---

## SPRINT PRIORITIES (Next 2 Weeks)

### PRIORITY 1: Email Report Delivery (Scheduled Summaries)
**User Story:**
> As a finance manager, I want to receive automated weekly bank statement summaries via email so that I don't need to log in to Leakly to stay on top of my cash position.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- User can configure weekly/monthly email schedule in dashboard settings
- Email contains: transaction count, top 5 expense categories, balance change, spending insights
- Email delivery success rate >99% with retry logic for failed sends

**Effort:** M (3-5 days)

**Why Now:**
- Free tier users churn without regular engagement → email keeps them returning
- Pro upsell hook: "Advanced insights" in premium emails
- Quick win before mobile launch (reduces mobile app dependency)

---

### PRIORITY 2: Multi-Upload Session & Bulk Processing
**User Story:**
> As an accountant managing 5 client accounts, I want to upload multiple bank statements at once and process them in parallel so that I don't spend 30 minutes uploading PDFs one-by-one.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Drag-and-drop zone accepts 10+ files simultaneously
- UI shows progress bar per file with success/failure status
- All files processed within 2x time of single file (parallel processing, not sequential)

**Effort:** M (3-5 days)

**Why Now:**
- OPSRUNNER use case: accountants batch-process 20+ statements daily
- Unlocks B2B (accounting firms) market segment
- Differentiator vs. Rocket Money (which requires individual uploads)

---

### PRIORITY 3: WhatsApp Alerts (First Critical Notification Channel)
**User Story:**
> As a business owner, I want to receive a WhatsApp message when my account balance drops below $5k so that I can take action immediately without checking email.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- User links WhatsApp number via Twilio/MessageBird integration
- Custom alerts for balance thresholds, large transactions (>$1k), unusual spending
- Alert sent within 2 minutes of transaction import

**Effort:** M (3-5 days)

**Why Now:**
- India market: WhatsApp is default notification channel (vs. email)
- Pro plan upseller: "Real-time alerts" = premium feature
- Roadmap promise to early users → trust signal

---

**Sprint Capacity Check:** 3 × M = 9-15 days → fits 2-week sprint ✅

---

  auto_renew BOOLEAN DEFAULT true,
  created_at TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE payment_events (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,

  event_type TEXT (payment.success | payment.failed | subscription.renewed),
  provider TEXT (stripe | razorpay),
  external_event_id TEXT,
  amount_inr DECIMAL,
  currency TEXT (INR | USD),
  metadata JSONB,
  processed_at TIMESTAMP,
  created_at TIMESTAMP
);

-- Add feature tracking

ADD COLUMN email_reports_enabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
ADD COLUMN whatsapp_alerts_enabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,

title: Tech review — June 18
output:
# LEAKLY — Weekly Tech & Product Review
**Date: June 18 | Sprint: Next 2 Weeks**

---

## SPRINT PRIORITIES (Next 2 Weeks)

### 1. **Razorpay Payment Integration (Subscription Checkout)**
**User Story:**
> As a privacy-conscious accountant, I want to upgrade to Leakly Pro via a secure, India-friendly payment method so that I can avoid sharing my banking credentials with third parties.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] User can select "Upgrade to Pro" → Razorpay checkout appears → payment succeeds → subscription status updates in Supabase within 5 seconds
- [ ] Webhook listener handles `payment.authorized` and `payment.failed` events; failed payments show retry UI
- [ ] Pro features (unlimited uploads, email reports) unlock immediately post-payment; user sees "Pro" badge in dashboard

**Effort:** **M (3-5 days)**

**Why Now:**
- Revenue blocker. Free tier is live; OpsRunner clients asking for Leakly payment options.
- India-first strategy: Razorpay handles INR, local payment methods (UPI, Netbanking).
- Stripe (US) comes Week 3.

---

### 2. **Email Report Generation & Delivery**
**User Story:**
> As a busy CFO, I want to receive weekly PDF summaries of my bank statement insights via email so that I don't have to log in to Leakly daily.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] User configures "Email Reports" (weekly/monthly) in settings → system generates PDF with spending breakdown, anomalies, trends
- [ ] Email delivery succeeds 99%+ of the time; failed sends trigger Slack alert to ops
- [ ] PDF includes: uploaded date range, top 5 expense categories, 2-3 AI insights (e.g., "27% spike in vendor X"), unsubscribe link

**Effort:** **M (3-5 days)**

**Why Now:**
- High-value retention feature. Reduces churn (users forget to check dashboard).
- Supports "Pro" upsell (free tier = monthly, Pro = weekly + custom frequency).
- Builds on existing statement parsing; minimal new data science.

---

### 3. **CSV/Excel Upload Error Recovery & Validation**
**User Story:**
> As a non-technical accountant, I want clear error messages when my CSV has wrong columns so that I can fix it and retry in under 2 minutes.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] File validation checks: column names (Date, Amount, Description), date format, numeric formatting → shows user "Missing columns: [Date]" before parsing
- [ ] If parse fails mid-stream, show which row broke + suggest fix (e.g., "Row 42: Invalid date format 'June-2024', use YYYY-MM-DD")
- [ ] UX: error modal suggests re-download template with correct format; one-click retry

**Effort:** **S (1-2 days)**

**Why Now:**
- Support friction. ~15% of free uploads fail; users abandon.
- Quick win. Improves CSAT + reduces support tickets.
- Unblocks India roadmap (different date/number formatting).

---

## PAYMENT INTEGRATION PLAN
**Scope: Razorpay (India) + Stripe (US)**

### Database Changes

```sql
-- 1. Subscription tracking
ALTER TABLE profiles ADD COLUMN (
  subscription_tier VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'free', -- 'free' | 'pro'
  subscription_status VARCHAR(20), -- 'active' | 'cancelled' | 'past_due'
  subscription_start_date TIMESTAMP,
  subscription_end_date TIMESTAMP,
  razorpay_customer_id VARCHAR(50),
  razorpay_subscription_id VARCHAR(50),
  stripe_customer_id VARCHAR(50),
  stripe_subscription_id VARCHAR(50)
);

-- 2. Payment history audit trail
CREATE TABLE payment_events (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES profiles(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  provider VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, -- 'razorpay' | 'stripe'
  event_type VARCHAR(50), -- 'payment.authorized' | 'subscription.created' | 'payment.failed'
  amount_cents INTEGER,
  currency VARCHAR(3), -- 'INR' | 'USD'
  provider_event_id VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  status VARCHAR(20), -- 'success' | 'failed' | 'pending'
  metadata JSONB, -- Store raw webhook payload
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT now()
);

-- 3. Feature entitlements (decouples features from tier)
CREATE TABLE feature_flags (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES profiles(id),
  feature_key VARCHAR(50), -- 'unlimited_uploads' | 'email

# LEAKLY — WEEKLY TECH & PRODUCT REVIEW
**June 18 — Sprint Planning + Infrastructure Decisions**

---

## SPRINT PRIORITIES (Next 2 Weeks)

### 1. **Email Report Export & Scheduling**
**User Story:**
As a *finance manager*, I want to *schedule weekly/monthly email summaries of my spending patterns* so that *I can track trends without logging in each time*.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ✅ User can select report frequency (weekly/monthly) + email recipients in dashboard settings
- ✅ System generates PDF with charts (category breakdown, anomalies, YoY comparison) and sends via Resend/SendGrid
- ✅ Report delivery tracked in DB with sent_at timestamp; users see "Last sent: June 17" in UI

**Effort:** **M (3-5 days)**

**Why Now:**
- Rocket Money sells *recurring insights* as retention hook
- Email = passive re-engagement (users check email daily). Converts free → pro
- Razorpay integration (next item) needs email receipts anyway

**Tech Stack:** Resend + Supabase scheduled functions (or trigger-based with pg_cron)

---

### 2. **WhatsApp Alerts for Unusual Spending**
**User Story:**
As a *small business owner*, I want to *receive WhatsApp notifications when expenses exceed monthly budget thresholds* so that *I catch overspending in real-time*.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ✅ User links WhatsApp via Twilio in settings (stores phone + status)
- ✅ System triggers alert when single transaction > 20% of avg monthly spend in that category
- ✅ Alert contains: amount, category, merchant + quick dashboard link

**Effort:** **M (4-5 days)**

**Why Now:**
- WhatsApp penetration in India = 98% (vs. email open rates ~25%)
- Positions Leakly for Indian SMBs (OpsRunner's future target market)
- Differentiates from Rocket Money (no WhatsApp alerts)

**Tech Stack:** Twilio WhatsApp API + Supabase realtime triggers

---

### 3. **Mobile-First Dashboard Layout Refactor**
**User Story:**
As a *mobile user*, I want to *see my spending summary in a card-based layout with single-tap actions* so that *I can analyze finances on my phone without zooming/scrolling excessively*.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ✅ Dashboard uses CSS Grid with 1-col mobile / 2-col tablet / 3-col desktop (no Tailwind breakpoint issues)
- ✅ PDF upload button + category filters work on touch (<48px tap targets)
- ✅ Charts (Recharts) render responsive; legend doesn't overflow on iPhone SE

**Effort:** **M (3-4 days)**

**Why Now:**
- 65% of users will access Leakly on mobile (pattern from fintech apps)
- Roadmap says "mobile app Q3" — this is groundwork
- Google Core Web Vitals affects ranking (mobile matters for SEO)

**Tech Stack:** Tailwind + Recharts responsive config + Next.js Image optimization

---

## PAYMENT INTEGRATION PLAN (Razorpay + Stripe)

### Database Schema Changes

```sql
-- Add to existing users table
ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN (
  stripe_customer_id VARCHAR(255),
  razorpay_customer_id VARCHAR(255),
  subscription_status VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'free', -- free|pro|pro_annual
  subscription_started_at TIMESTAMP,
  subscription_ends_at TIMESTAMP,
  billing_currency VARCHAR(3) -- INR|USD
);

-- New payments table
CREATE TABLE payments (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id UUID REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  provider VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, -- 'stripe'|'razorpay'
  transaction_id VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  amount DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
  currency VARCHAR(3) NOT NULL,
  status VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, -- captured|failed|pending
  plan_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, -- pro|pro_annual
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
  paid_at TIMESTAMP
);

-- Webhook logs (for debugging failed events)
CREATE TABLE webhook_logs (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,
  provider VARCHAR(50),
  event_type VARCHAR(100),
  payload JSONB,
  processed BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
);
```

### API Endpoints to Create

#### **POST `/api/payments/create-subscription`**
- **Input:** `{ plan: 'pro'|'pro_annual', provider: 'razorpay'|'stripe', countryCode: 'IN'|'US' }`
- **Logic:** 
  - Create Stripe/Razorpay order
  - Store

title: Tech review — June 17

# LEAKLY — Weekly Tech & Product Review
**Date: June 17 | Sprint: Next 2 weeks**

---

## SPRINT PRIORITIES (Next 2 weeks)

### **Feature 1: Email Report Generation & Delivery**
**User Story:**  
As a finance manager, I want automated weekly/monthly PDF reports of my bank statement analysis emailed to me, so I don't have to manually log in to check my spending trends.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ✅ Users can set report frequency (weekly/monthly) and recipient email(s) in settings
- ✅ System generates PDF with summary, category breakdown, and anomalies detected; delivered within 1 hour of schedule
- ✅ Email template matches brand; includes unsubscribe link + account login CTA

**Effort:** **M (3-5 days)**

**Why Now:**  
- Drives engagement & retention (users stay in product longer)
- Minimal tech debt (builds on existing analysis engine)
- Competitive edge vs. Rocket Money (they don't do scheduled emails)
- Foundation for WhatsApp alerts (same notification infrastructure)

**Tech Stack:**
- Queue: Bull.js + Redis (or Supabase pg_cron for MVP)
- PDF: PDFKit or pdfme
- Email: SendGrid or AWS SES
- New DB table: `user_report_settings` + `report_jobs`

---

### **Feature 2: WhatsApp Spending Alerts**
**User Story:**  
As a budget-conscious user, I want to receive WhatsApp alerts when my spending exceeds category thresholds, so I catch overspending immediately without opening the app.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ✅ Users can set spending limits per category with alert threshold (e.g., "notify at 80% of $500 Food budget")
- ✅ WhatsApp alert sent via Twilio when threshold crossed; includes category, spent amount, and remaining budget
- ✅ User can disable alerts per category; no spam (max 2 alerts/day per category)

**Effort:** **M (4-5 days)**

**Why Now:**  
- Mobile monetization hook (alerts drive app engagement)
- Requires Twilio integration (foundational for future SMS features)
- High-value for India market (WhatsApp >500M users, SMS already familiar)
- Feeds subscription justification (free tier = no alerts; Pro = unlimited)

**Tech Stack:**
- Queue: Bull.js (same as email feature)
- Messaging: Twilio WhatsApp Business API
- New DB tables: `spending_alerts`, `alert_history`

---

### **Feature 3: Multi-Upload Batching & Processing Status**
**User Story:**  
As an accountant managing multiple client statements, I want to upload 5-10 PDFs at once and see real-time processing status, so I can handle batch uploads efficiently without waiting between files.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ✅ File input accepts multiple files; shows upload progress bar per file
- ✅ Dashboard displays processing status (queued → analyzing → complete) with ETA
- ✅ Users notified (email/in-app) when batch completes; can download all reports as ZIP

**Effort:** **M (3-5 days)**

**Why Now:**  
- Unblocks OpsRunner integration (accountants = heavy batch users)
- Current single-file UX bottleneck (user testing feedback)
- Requires queue refactor (needed before payments anyway)
- Prep for Bank AA integration (high-frequency data pulls)

**Tech Stack:**
- Frontend: React Hook Form + Uppy.js (drag-drop + multiple)
- Backend: Bull.js queue + Supabase `batch_jobs` table
- Real-time: Supabase realtime subscriptions for status updates

---

## PAYMENT INTEGRATION PLAN

  status VARCHAR(50), -- 'active', 'past_due', 'canceled', 'trialing'
  currency VARCHAR(3), -- 'INR', 'USD'
  amount_cents INT, -- stored in cents for precision
  billing_cycle_start TIMESTAMP,
  billing_cycle_end TIMESTAMP,
  payment_provider VARCHAR(20), -- 'razorpay', 'stripe'

);

## 2. PRICING DECISION — PRO TIER ANALYSIS

**Revenue Impact at 500 Total Paid Users (mix: 70% Pro, 30% Business):**

| Price Point | Pro Users (350) | Business Users (150) | Monthly Revenue | Annual Revenue | vs. $9.99 |
|-------------|-----------------|----------------------|-----------------|-----------------|-----------|
| **$7.99/mo** | 350 | 150 | $3,546 | $42,552 | -$3,780 (-8.2%) |
| **$9.99/mo** | 350 | 150 | $4,346 | $52,152 | **BASELINE** |
| **$12.99/mo** | 350 | 150 | $5,446 | $65,352 | +$13,200 (+25.3%) |

**Demand Elasticity Test (estimated price sensitivity):**
- At $7.99: +15% user volume (= 403 Pro users) → $4,086 MRR (+6% vs $9.99 baseline)
- At $12.99: -10% user volume (= 315 Pro users) → $4,994 MRR (+15% vs $9.99 baseline)

### **RECOMMENDATION: $9.99/month**

**Reason:**
1. **Sweet spot positioning** — $3 below Rocket Money ($12.99), $0.50 above Copilot comparable ($9.49), undercuts on privacy
2. **Psychological pricing** — Single-digit psychology drives conversion; $12.99 triggers "enterprise feature" expectations
3. **Churn risk** — Price-sensitive users (your early adopter profile) show 7-9% churn at $12.99; $9.99 maintains 5% baseline
4. **CAC recovery** — At $9.99, break-even on $25 CAC in 2.5 months vs. 3 months at $12.99 (matters in year 1)
5. **Market validation** — Competitor Rocket Money's $14/mo includes bank login friction; your no-login advantage justifies $9.99 parity
